members.name: open
members.description: Opens the drawer and dispatches `mui-drawer-open`.

members.name: close
members.description: Closes the drawer and dispatches `mui-drawer-close`.

events.name: mui-drawer-open
events.description: Dispatched by `open()` when the drawer opens.

events.name: mui-drawer-close
events.description: Dispatched by `close()` when the drawer closes.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Controls drawer visibility.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Drawer width. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Drawer layout height. Accepts any valid CSS height value, such as 100dvh, 100lvh, a product-owned CSS custom property, or a fixed contained demo height. Use 100lvh for full-screen shells that should keep the largest viewport height when iOS Safari or Home Screen web apps initially report a smaller dynamic viewport.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Side from which the drawer is displayed.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Layout behaviour: modal overlay, collapsible adjacent page layout, persistent adjacent layout, or workspace shell with left and right panels.

attributes.name: left-open
attributes.description: Displays the left panel when variant='workspace'.

attributes.name: right-open
attributes.description: Displays the right panel when variant='workspace'.

attributes.name: left-width
attributes.description: Left panel width when variant='workspace'. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: right-width
attributes.description: Right panel width when variant='workspace'. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: z-index
attributes.description: Overlay stacking value; the drawer surface is rendered one level above it.

attributes.name: drawer-space
attributes.description: Removes default padding from the drawer content region when present.

attributes.name: hide-header
attributes.description: Hides the built-in header even when title slot content is present. Use when drawer body content provides a custom header composition or custom dismissal controls.

attributes.name: close-size
attributes.description: Sets the built-in header close icon scale and matching header minimum height. Medium uses a small Button; large uses a medium Button.

attributes.name: breakpoint
attributes.description: Pixel breakpoint where push, persistent or workspace layouts switch to their narrow-screen presentation.

attributes.name: mobile-presentation
attributes.description: Narrow-screen presentation for persistent drawers. Overlay keeps the page visible behind a modal side drawer; stack keeps the previous block layout for custom mobile compositions.

attributes.name: resize-rail
attributes.description: Adds opt-in desktop resize rails. Push and persistent drawers get a rail between drawer and page; workspace drawers get independent left and right rails. Dragging updates the relevant width while clamping to a minimum drawer width and preserving page space. Focused rails can be nudged with ArrowLeft/ArrowRight, or Shift plus arrow keys for larger steps; when keyboard resizing reaches the minimum width, the rail shows an ESC affordance for closing. Rails remain below Menu and overlay content in the stacking order.

attributes.name: resize-min-drawer-width
attributes.description: Minimum drawer width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled.

attributes.name: resize-min-left-width
attributes.description: Minimum left panel width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled on variant='workspace'. Overrides resize-min-drawer-width for the left panel only.

attributes.name: resize-min-right-width
attributes.description: Minimum right panel width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled on variant='workspace'. Overrides resize-min-drawer-width for the right panel only.

attributes.name: resize-min-page-width
attributes.description: Minimum page width in pixels preserved while resize-rail is enabled.

attributes.name: resize-close-threshold
attributes.description: Close threshold in pixels for resizable push and workspace drawers. Dragging below resize-min-drawer-width keeps visible width clamped; releasing below this value closes the drawer or workspace side.

attributes.name: contained
attributes.description: Keeps narrow-screen push, persistent, and workspace overlay presentation bounded by the drawer container. Use for story canvases, cards, and nested layouts.

contextualAttributes.name: data-close
contextualAttributes.description: Marker applied to a slotted action; integration code uses it to call the owning drawer's `close()` method.

slots.description: Primary scrollable drawer content.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Header title content. Providing it reveals the drawer header unless hide-header is set.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Footer action content. Providing it reveals the fixed footer region.

slots.name: page
slots.description: Page region displayed alongside `push`, `persistent`, and `workspace` variants. Use a plain `div` as the direct slotted wrapper, then compose Stack or other layout components inside it.

slots.name: left
slots.description: Left workspace panel content when variant='workspace'.

slots.name: right
slots.description: Right workspace panel content when variant='workspace'.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-background
cssProperties.description: Drawer surface and footer background.

cssProperties.name: --header-min-height
cssProperties.description: Shared minimum height applied to the Drawer header.

cssProperties.name: --header-min-height-x-small
cssProperties.description: Drawer header minimum height when close-size is x-small.

cssProperties.name: --header-min-height-small
cssProperties.description: Drawer header minimum height when close-size is small.

cssProperties.name: --header-min-height-medium
cssProperties.description: Drawer header minimum height when close-size is medium.

cssProperties.name: --header-min-height-large
cssProperties.description: Drawer header minimum height when close-size is large.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-height
cssProperties.description: Drawer layout height shared by the host, shell, page, and mobile overlay panels. Set through the `height` attribute or directly in CSS.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-size
cssProperties.description: Width of the resize rail when resize-rail is enabled.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the resize rail outer container.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-inner-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the visual line indicator in the resize rail.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-threshold-indicator
cssProperties.description: Resize rail indicator color when a resizable push or workspace drawer is dragged into the close threshold.

declarations.name: muiDocs
declarations.default: { Dropdown: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["action"], }, title: "Dropdown", description: "The dropdown has a trigger action and an overlay menu. The action can use any mui-button variant, while menu options follow a predefined style. declarations.description: Displays a triggered overlay menu with configurable alignment, direction, and persistent interaction behaviour.
declarations.name: MuiDropdown

events.name: dropdown-toggle
events.description: Dispatched when the dropdown opens or closes with `detail.open`.

attributes.name: zindex
attributes.description: Stacking level applied to the dropdown menu surface.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Horizontal menu alignment relative to its trigger.

attributes.name: vertical-position
attributes.description: Preferred vertical direction with viewport-aware fallback.

attributes.name: persistent
attributes.description: Keeps the menu open while users interact with slotted menu content.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Enforces a shared size on the trigger action and slotted `mui-menu` surface.

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Vertical distance between the trigger and menu. Accepts any valid CSS length, including tokens and `calc()`.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Dropdown trigger, typically a `mui-button`.
A required `mui-menu` surface containing menu actions and grouped overlay content. Menus without an explicit width use min(100%, 18rem) while portaled.

cssProperties.name: --dropdown-offset
cssProperties.description: Default vertical distance used when the `offset` attribute is absent.

declarations.description: Wraps a form control with shared label, sizing, and message feedback behavior.
declarations.name: MuiField

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Message feedback state. `info` displays non-blocking informational guidance.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Fallback feedback text rendered below the slotted control.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label forwarded to the slotted form control.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the forwarded label while preserving its accessible meaning.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size forwarded to the slotted form control and message content.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Marks the field as optional and forwards that state to the slotted control.

slots.description: Primary form control, such as `mui-input`, `mui-select`, or `mui-textarea`.

slots.name: message
slots.description: Custom message content displayed beneath the form control.

declarations.default: { FinancialBarChart: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["header","footer"], }, title: "Financial Bar Chart", description: "Financial Bar Chart presents periodic financial or economic values as a time-based histogram.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-financial-bar-chart/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/financial-bar-chart"], guides: [""], usage: { list: ["Use for time-based values such as inflation, interest rates, trading volume, revenue, returns, and cash flow.", "Provide time/value objects through the data property. do not rely on bar color alone."], engineerList: ["Provide label and the appropriate value-format and currency.", "Keep TradingView attribution enabled unless the consuming page supplies the required visible attribution and NOTICE information."] }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Optional header", "Histogram plot", "Time scale", "Price scale", "Optional footer"] }, variants: { items: [] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "economic-indicator", title: "Economic Indicator", list: ["Use a neutral histogram for periodic indicators where the height and progression of each period are primary.", "Compose the latest value and release context with Muibook components in the header and footer slots.", "This lead example keeps attribution='logo'; they are not manually assigned per bar.", "Always pair color with values, labels, or surrounding context because color alone must not communicate meaning."] }, { key: "scale", title: "Scale Options", list: ["Keep both scales for analysis, retain only time for compact trends, or hide both when surrounding UI already communicates units and period."] }, { key: "states", title: "States", list: ["Use loading while data is requested, error for failed requests, and the automatic empty state when no data is available."] }, ] }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [{ name: "Market Sparkline", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/market-sparkline" }, { name: "Financial Chart", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/financial-chart" }] }, rules: [], behaviour: { list: ["The chart resizes with its host using the chart engine's native auto-size behavior.", "A populated header receives a divider by default; attributes.description: Numeric threshold used by directional coloring and the baseline price line.

slots.description: Muibook content rendered in the component-padded region after the plot.

declarations.default: { FinancialChart: { title: "Financial Chart", description: "Financial Chart presents interactive OHLCV market data as candlesticks or an area series.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-financial-chart/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/financial-chart"], guides: [""], usage: { list: ["Use candlesticks when open, high, low, and close values matter; use area for a simpler price trend.", "Compose Financial Chart inside Card when the chart needs a framed surface; Financial Chart remains unframed so it can also fit existing panels and full-width layouts.", "Provide OHLCV objects through the data property rather than an HTML attribute. When composing Muibook UI in Redactd, populate the structured Data field through props.data; Redactd passes it to the component.", "Keep the TradingView logo enabled by default. In a chart cluster, use attribution='none' to remove repeated logos only when the containing experience provides one visible TradingView attribution and the required NOTICE information."] }, accessibility: { designerList: ["Do not rely on positive and negative color alone; retain price and change text in the summary."], engineerList: ["Provide a meaningful symbol and currency. Financial Chart maintains a live textual summary of the visible data."] }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Instrument summary", "Range controls", "Price pane", "Volume pane", "Price scale", "Time scale"] }, variants: { items: [] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "candlestick", title: "Candlestick", list: ["Use for detailed market analysis where the relationship between open, high, low, and close values is important.", "Volume is rendered in a separate pane and uses the same positive and negative direction as each candle.", "This lead example keeps attribution='logo'; the remaining page examples use attribution='none' to avoid repetition within the chart cluster."] }, { key: "area-compact", title: "Area: Compact", list: ["Use a compact chart cluster to compare positive, negative, and neutral semantic treatments at a glance.", "Each chart uses the same OHLCV data contract; trend changes the area line and fill without transforming the market data.", "Remove repeated attribution only when the containing experience provides one visible TradingView attribution and the required NOTICE information."] }, { key: "area-positive", title: "Area: Positive", list: ["Use the positive area treatment when the complete trend carries a known positive outcome.", "Do not infer positive meaning from the final value alone; applications should select the treatment from the surrounding financial context.", "Pair the color treatment with values, labels, or supporting text so color is not the only status indicator."] }, { key: "area-negative", title: "Area: Negative", list: ["Use the negative area treatment when the complete trend carries a known negative outcome.", "Do not infer negative meaning from the final value alone; applications should select the treatment from the surrounding financial context.", "Pair the color treatment with values, labels, or supporting text so color is not the only status indicator."] }, { key: "area-neutral", title: "Area: Neutral", list: ["Use the neutral area treatment when the chart should communicate shape without positive or negative status.", "Keep the same OHLCV data contract so applications can switch presentation or trend treatment without transforming market data.", "Use header-stroke='none' when the toolbar and chart should read as one uninterrupted region."] }, { key: "states", title: "States", list: ["Use loading while market data is being requested, error for a failed request, and the automatic empty state when no data is available."] }, ] }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [{ name: "Range Input", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/range-input" }, { name: "Status", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/status" }] }, rules: [], behaviour: { list: ["The chart resizes with its host and redraws when Muibook brand or theme attributes change.", "Range controls filter local data and emit financial-chart-range-change for applications that fetch range-specific data.", "The update method supports streaming replacement of the latest interval without replacing the complete dataset."] }, writing: { list: ["Use recognized market symbols, explicit currencies, and concise interval labels."] }, }, }

declarations.default: { FormGroup: { title: "Form Group", description: "Form Group organizes related form controls inside a Form Section with optional second-level headings.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2133-17795&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/forms-form-group--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-form-group/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/form-group"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/field"], usage: { list: [ "Use inside Form Section to create second-level groups.", "Set heading to label a group.", "Use hide-heading when a heading is redundant.", "Use variant='horizontal' for split rows that collapse on mobile.", "Override horizontal columns with --form-group-horizontal-template.", "For hints and validation copy, use mui-field slot='message' for consistent spacing.", "Avoid standalone helper rows between fields; keep messaging attached to each field.", "Use heading-level to set the correct semantic heading hierarchy without changing the visual heading size.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: [""] }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Optional heading", "Grouped slotted controls"] }, variants: { items: [ { key: "default", title: "Default", description: "Stacked vertical group.", image: "" }, { key: "horizontal", title: "Horizontal", description: "Two-column group that stacks on mobile.", image: "" }, ], }, stories: { items: [ { "key": "vertical-group", "title": "Vertical Group", "description": "Stacked group with heading, choice controls, and field-level guidance.", "list": [ "Use a stacked group when the controls belong to the same decision area.", "Keep helper and status copy attached to the relevant field.", "When the message belongs to a specific mui-field inside the group, use slot="message" on that field.", "Use a colored mui-form-message for static guidance that needs more emphasis; attributes.description: Hides the group heading when surrounding structure already supplies the context.

attributes.description: Legacy alias for `hide-heading`.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Layout orientation for grouped content. `horizontal` stacks below the mobile breakpoint.

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Gap between grouped items. Accepts any valid CSS gap value or design token.

attributes.name: aligny
attributes.description: Vertical alignment of items in a horizontal group, for example aligning a button with a select control.

slots.description: Related form controls and supporting content.

cssProperties.name: --form-group-align-y

declarations.description: Arranges slotted content in a configurable grid with token-based spacing and alignment controls.
declarations.name: MuiGrid

attributes.name: col
attributes.description: Column template. Accepts any valid CSS `grid-template-columns` value.

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Gap between grid items. Accepts any valid CSS gap value or design token.

attributes.name: alignx
attributes.description: Horizontal item alignment, mapped to CSS `justify-items`.

attributes.name: aligny
attributes.description: Vertical item alignment, mapped to CSS `align-items`.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Padding inside the grid. Accepts any valid CSS padding value or design token.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the host height. Accepts any valid CSS height value, including tokens.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the host width. Accepts any valid CSS width value, including tokens.

attributes.name: viewport
attributes.description: Sets grid height to `100dvh` for viewport-height layouts.

attributes.name: fill
attributes.description: Sets available width and height to `100%` of the parent layout.

slots.description: Content arranged as grid items.

cssProperties.name: --grid-height
cssProperties.description: Resolved grid host height. Prefer `height`, `viewport` or `fill` for common layouts.

cssProperties.name: --grid-width
cssProperties.description: Resolved grid host width. Prefer `width` or `fill` for common layouts.

declarations.description: Renders heading typography with an independently configurable visual size and semantic level.
declarations.name: MuiHeading

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the visual heading size.

attributes.name: level
attributes.description: Sets the semantic heading level; defaults to the selected visual size. Use none for display typography that must not enter the document heading outline.

attributes.name: truncate
attributes.description: Clamps heading text to a single line with ellipsis when the available width is constrained.

attributes.name: clamp
attributes.description: Limits heading text to the provided number of lines. Ignored when truncate is present.

slots.description: Heading text content.

cssProperties.name: --heading-font-family
cssProperties.description: Font family applied to heading text.

cssProperties.name: --heading-font-weight
cssProperties.description: Font weight applied to heading text.

cssProperties.name: --heading-text-color
cssProperties.description: Color applied to heading text.

cssProperties.name: --heading-line-clamp
cssProperties.description: Resolved number of visible lines used by the clamp attribute.

declarations.default: { Hint: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["trigger"], }, title: "Hint", description: "Hint provides a trigger + floating tooltip pattern for contextual help.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2133-17739&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/forms-hint--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-hint/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/hint"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/hint"], usage: { list: [ "Use for short contextual help that appears on hover or focus.", "Slot the trigger UI into slot='trigger' (icon, badge, text, or custom content).", "When the trigger is already focusable, such as a button or link, focus remains on that control.", "When the trigger is plain content, Hint adds fallback keyboard focus so the tooltip can still be discovered.", "Set placement to top, bottom, left, or right to control tooltip position.", "Delay is intentional by default: hint open is clamped to 250-2000ms (default 500ms) to prevent instant pop.", "Use delay and initial-delay to tune open timing when needed.", "Use disable-on-touch when the hint is a desktop-only enhancement and touch users already have enough visible or accessible context.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [ "Keep hint copy short and supportive. tooltip behavior.", ], engineerList: [ "Ensure the trigger has a clear accessible name, especially for icon-only controls.", "When Hint wraps a focusable control, focus stays on that control and the hint supplements the label rather than replacing it.", "Use disable-on-touch for desktop-only affordances so coarse-pointer and no-hover devices do not retain awkward tooltip states.", ], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Trigger slot", "Tooltip content", "Placement behavior"] }, variants: { items: [{ key: "", title: "", description: "", image: "" }] }, stories: { items: [ { "key": "default", declarations.description: Displays contextual tooltip content when its trigger receives hover or keyboard focus.
declarations.name: MuiHint

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Positions the hint relative to its trigger.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Displays the hint content.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description: Delay in milliseconds for subsequent openings, clamped between 250 and 2000.

attributes.name: initial-delay
attributes.description: Delay in milliseconds for the first opening, clamped between 250 and 2000.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the inferred size for an unsized icon or badge trigger.

attributes.name: disable-on-touch
attributes.description: Disables hint behaviour on touch-like devices, useful when the hint is a desktop-only enhancement.

slots.description: Tooltip content.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: Hint trigger content. Plain content receives fallback keyboard focus; already-focusable controls such as mui-button or mui-link keep focus on the control.

cssProperties.name: --hint-background
cssProperties.description: Hint surface background.

cssProperties.name: --hint-border-color
cssProperties.description: Hint surface border color.

cssProperties.name: --hint-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Focus-visible outline used when Hint creates fallback focus for plain trigger content.

cssProperties.name: --hint-focus-outline-offset
cssProperties.description: Focus-visible outline offset used by the fallback trigger wrapper. Defaults to an outset stroke-size-200 offset.

cssProperties.name: --hint-focus-radius
cssProperties.description: Focus-visible outline radius used by the fallback trigger wrapper.

cssProperties.name: --hint-max-width
cssProperties.description: Maximum tooltip content width.

cssProperties.name: --hint-shadow
cssProperties.description: Hint surface shadow.

cssProperties.name: --hint-text-color
cssProperties.description: Hint content text color.

declarations.description: Representative API for Muibook illustration elements.
declarations.name: MuiIllustrationTrash

members.name: play
members.description: Starts particle motion. A static illustration switches to one-shot motion.

members.name: pause
members.description: Pauses the current particle animation.

members.name: restart
members.description: Restarts the current one-shot or looping particle animation.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the illustration footprint.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Sets an illustration color preset or accepts any valid CSS color.

attributes.name: motion
attributes.description: Controls optional particle motion without animating the primary illustration subject.

cssProperties.name: --illustration-main-color-default
cssProperties.description: Primary color used by default illustrations.

cssProperties.name: --illustration-main-color-inverted
cssProperties.description: Primary color used by inverted illustrations.

declarations.description: Frames a slotted image with optional cropping, focal positioning and caption content.
declarations.name: MuiImage

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the rendered image container height using any valid CSS height value.

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description: Controls how the image fits its container.

attributes.name: crop
attributes.description: Enables cropped image presentation.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Sets the object position when a focal position is not supplied.

attributes.name: zoom
attributes.description: Scales the image around its focal position.

attributes.name: focal-x
attributes.description: Sets the horizontal focal point used for cropped images.

attributes.name: focal-y
attributes.description: Sets the vertical focal point used for cropped images.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Sets the frame border radius.

attributes.name: aspect-ratio
attributes.description: Sets the media aspect ratio using any valid CSS aspect-ratio value.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Image media, normally an `img` element.

slots.name: caption
slots.description: Optional caption content, normally a `figcaption` element.

declarations.description: Transitions between two slotted icons to communicate an active or expanded state.
declarations.name: MuiIconToggle

attributes.name: toggle
attributes.description: Displays the end icon instead of the start icon.

attributes.name: rotate
attributes.description: Rotates the icon when switching state.

attributes.name: morph
attributes.description: Applies a transition when switching between states.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the icon toggle footprint.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Icon displayed when the toggle is inactive.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Icon displayed when the toggle is active.

declarations.description: Captures a single text-like form value with label, validation state and composable affordance slots.
declarations.name: MuiInput

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the current input value.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the native input change event occurs with `detail.value`.

events.name: input
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched during value entry with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Native input data type.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current input value.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Hint displayed when no value is entered.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Input identifier used to associate the visible label.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible input label. Required for labelled form usage.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables input interaction.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the supplied label while preserving it as the accessible name.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual validation state.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an optional marker beside the label.

attributes.name: max-length
attributes.description: Maximum character length. Providing it displays a live count.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Input and slotted affordance size scale.

attributes.name: slot-layout
attributes.description: Arranges external before and after slots inline or stacked around the input.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description: Focuses the input after it renders.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Overrides native input block padding with a CSS length or token.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Overrides native input inline padding with a CSS length or token.

attributes.name: surface
attributes.description: Visual surface style. Seamless removes borders and backgrounds.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Flush leading control, such as `mui-addon`, `mui-select`, `mui-button` or `mui-chip`.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Flush trailing control, such as `mui-addon`, `mui-select`, `mui-button` or `mui-chip`.

slots.name: inside-before
slots.description: Leading content displayed inside the input edge, such as an icon or badge.

slots.name: inside-after
slots.description: Trailing content displayed inside the input edge, such as an icon or badge.

slots.name: hint
slots.description: Contextual hint content displayed inside the trailing input affordance area.

cssProperties.name: --input-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Overrides the size-specific focus outline, including `none` for composed instances that provide another visible focus treatment.

cssProperties.name: --input-before-slot-max-width
cssProperties.description: Maximum width for leading external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-after-slot-max-width
cssProperties.description: Maximum width for trailing external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-slot-wrap
cssProperties.description: Wrapping behaviour for external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-slot-overflow-x
cssProperties.description: Horizontal overflow behaviour for external slot content.

declarations.default: { Link: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["before","after"], }, title: "Link", description: "Links are used to navigate between pages or external content. They are visually distinct from surrounding text by using underlines — a familiar and accessible pattern that ensures clarity and consistency.", hero: [ "https://images.ctfassets.net/i5uwscj4pkk2/7bK1593sNzW75ZoqBupCRj/0420d8ef12472208403efa48d2fe98d6/Link_-_Home_Image.png", ], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=3-663&t=fSFYVey9aCoE5oQa-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/actions-link--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-link/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/link"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/link"], usage: { list: [ "Use links to navigate to related content or different pages.", "Use for navigation only — use buttons for actions like submitting forms or changing data.", "Keep link text concise and descriptive. Avoid vague labels like 'Click here.'", "Use full sentences or phrases that clearly describe the destination.", "Prefer inline links within body text unless a more prominent callout is needed.", "Use variant='unstyled' when Link wraps structured, non-interactive content such as Card and that content must own all visible surface, spacing, and typography.", "Do not place links, buttons, or other interactive controls inside an unstyled Link.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: [""], }, anatomy: { image: "https://images.ctfassets.net/i5uwscj4pkk2/6Rbr0KRWAiNRuPsagpreV7/2adc3626aa45ddc95ddf7d0a508c7917/Link_-_Anatomy.png", list: [ "LABEL: Text describing the link / link button action. Use action verbs or phrases to tell the user what will happen next, and follow the link label content guidelines.", "BEFORE: An optional area to include an icon before the label. Use an icon to add additional affordance where the icon has a clear and well-established meaning. Most links don't require an icon, so be consistent and deliberate when you do.", "AFTER: An optional area to include an icon after the label, often used for a chevron-down-arrow icon to indicate a dropdown menu or accordion experiences where the placement is on the far right of the link.", "ICON ONLY: Use when the action is easily understood and space is limited.", ], }, variants: { items: [ { key: "size-large", title: "Size: Large", description: "Used when a link needs to stand out in layouts, such as hero sections or alongside large headings. If used inline, it should match the surrounding text size to maintain visual hierarchy and scale consistency. E.g. declarations.description: Provides anchor navigation as an inline link or action-styled link with optional supporting content.
declarations.name: MuiLink

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Anchor browsing context, such as `_self` or `_blank`.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Navigation destination URL.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Uses standard inline-link styling, an action-style treatment, or Unstyled for structured slotted content such as Card without link decoration, action sizing, padding, or typography.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables navigation and exposes the anchor as aria-disabled.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: Font weight of link content.

attributes.name: stroke
attributes.description: Controls whether action-style link strokes are drawn with the normal border or an inset ring shadow.

attributes.name: stroke-ring-size
attributes.description: Ring stroke width when `stroke="ring"` is used on action-style links. Token values map to `--stroke-size-*`.

attributes.name: focus-ring
attributes.description: Controls focus outline placement. The default is inset; use `outset` only when the focus ring should sit outside the action.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Link scale; also controls automatic icon, File Icon, avatar, badge, and Switch sizing.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: Downloads the linked resource; provide a value to set a download filename.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Uses field-compatible styling when the link is slotted before or after an input.

attributes.name: align
attributes.description: Aligns content to the inline start and pushes trailing slot content to the inline end.

slots.description: Link label or a single icon for an icon-only link action.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Leading icon, avatar, badge, or other supporting content.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Trailing icon, avatar, badge, or other supporting content.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Controls the link focus-visible outline. Defaults to stroke-size-400.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the link focus-visible outline offset. Defaults to an inset stroke-size-400 offset.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-inset-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the default inset focus outline offset. Defaults to stroke-size-400.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-outset-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the positive outline offset when `focus-ring="outset"` is used. Defaults to stroke-size-200.

cssProperties.name: --link-focus-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the default inline link focus outline radius. Defaults to radius-200.

seamless, polished experience.", hero: [""], figma: [ "https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=1059-12710&t=BwezUSymTClm00wJ-1", ], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/loading-loader--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-loader/index.ts"], website: declarations.description: Animates slotted content into view for loading and refresh states.
declarations.name: MuiLoader

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Turns the loader animation behavior on for the slotted content.

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Selects the loading transition behavior.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: Sets the translate direction when `animation="translate"` is used.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Sets the animation timing duration.

slots.description: The content that adopts the configured loading animation.

declarations.name: muiDocs
declarations.default: { MarketSparkline: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["header","footer"], }, title: "Market Sparkline", description: "Market Sparkline presents a compact financial or economic trend inside composed Muibook interfaces.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-market-sparkline/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/market-sparkline"], guides: [""], usage: { list: ["Use for compact market summaries where direction and shape matter more than exact axis inspection.", "Compose Sparkline inside Card when it needs a framed dashboard surface; the component remains unframed for use within existing panels.", "Provide time/value objects through the data property. When composing Muibook UI in Redactd, populate the structured Data field through props.data; Redactd passes it to the component.", "Compose headings, values, badges, and actions through Muibook components in the header and footer slots.", "In a chart cluster, use attribution='none' to remove repeated TradingView logos only when the containing experience provides one visible attribution and the required NOTICE information.", "Use Financial Chart when users need scales, ranges, OHLC values, or detailed analysis."] }, accessibility: { designerList: ["Always pair the visual trend with a textual value or change indicator; color and line direction are supplemental."], engineerList: ["Provide label for the generated chart summary.", "Keep TradingView attribution enabled unless the consuming page supplies the required visible attribution and NOTICE information."] }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Optional header", "Compact plot", "Optional footer"] }, variants: { items: [] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "market-overview", title: "Market Overview", list: ["Compose Sparkline with existing Muibook typography and layout components rather than duplicating summary UI inside the chart.", "Use Card Body size none when the Sparkline header and footer own the cluster's internal spacing.", "Use Heading level none for the prominent market value because it is display text, not a section heading.", "Auto trend compares the first and latest values and selects the positive or negative theme treatment.", "This cluster uses attribution='none' on every Sparkline; the containing product experience must provide the required visible attribution and NOTICE information elsewhere."] }, { key: "small-card", title: "Sparkline: Small Card", list: ["Use a wrapping horizontal Stack when multiple Sparkline Cards should share a row and move onto separate rows as space narrows.", "Use a two-column composition inside each Card when the trend and supporting market summary should carry equal visual weight.", "Use Card Body size small for compact paired content.", "Use Link variant unstyled when the entire Card navigates to one destination; do not place other interactive controls inside the Card.", "Use Heading level none for the prominent market value because it is display text, not a section heading."] }, { key: "large-card", title: "Sparkline: Large Card", list: ["Use a full-width Sparkline when the trend is the primary content of a larger dashboard card.", "Use Card Body size medium to create balanced separation around the summary and chart.", "Use Heading level none for prominent instrument and market values because they are display text, not section headings."] }, { key: "trend-colours", title: "Trend Colours", list: ["Use positive and negative only when direction carries meaning; use neutral when the Sparkline should communicate shape without a directional status.", "Use trend='auto' for data-driven direction, or set an explicit trend when the surrounding domain determines the semantic treatment.", "Always pair trend color with visible text because color alone must not communicate status."] }, { key: "types", title: "Types", list: ["Use area for a prominent trend, line for the quietest presentation, and baseline when movement above and below a reference value matters.", "Compose a compact header through the Sparkline header slot when each chart type needs an adjacent title and supporting label."] }, { key: "states", title: "States", list: ["Use loading while data is requested, error for failed requests, and the automatic empty state when no data is available."] }, ] }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [{ name: "Financial Chart", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/financial-chart" }, { name: "Card", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/card" }] }, rules: [], behaviour: { list: ["The plot resizes with its host using the chart engine's native auto-size behavior.", "Changing type, trend, baseline, or theme redraws the series without changing the supplied data.", "Interactive is opt-in so compact dashboard charts do not capture scrolling or pointer gestures by default."] }, writing: { list: ["Use recognized instrument names, symbols, currencies, and concise change labels."] }, }, }

declarations.description: Displays a compact financial time series as a line, area, or baseline chart.
declarations.name: MuiMarketSparkline

events.name: market-sparkline-crosshair-change
events.description: Fires with the matching datum when an interactive crosshair moves.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Sparkline presentation.

attributes.name: trend
attributes.description: Color direction. Auto compares the first and latest values.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible instrument or metric label.

attributes.name: currency
attributes.description: Optional currency included in the accessible summary.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: CSS length applied to the plot region.

attributes.name: baseline
attributes.description: Numeric baseline value. Defaults to the first visible value.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Enables crosshair, scrolling, and scale gestures.

attributes.name: attribution
attributes.description: Controls the TradingView attribution logo. Use none only when the consuming page provides the required attribution.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Displays the loading state over the plot.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Displays an error message over the plot.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Muibook content rendered before the plot.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Muibook content rendered after the plot.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-background
cssProperties.description: Canvas and state background.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-positive-color
cssProperties.description: Positive trend line.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-negative-color
cssProperties.description: Negative trend line.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-neutral-color
cssProperties.description: Neutral trend line.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-positive-area-top-color
cssProperties.description: Positive area fill nearest the line.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-positive-area-bottom-color
cssProperties.description: Positive area fill nearest the baseline.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-negative-area-top-color
cssProperties.description: Negative area fill nearest the line.

cssProperties.name: --market-sparkline-negative-area-bottom-color
cssProperties.description: Negative area fill nearest the baseline.

declarations.default: { MediaPlayer: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["meta-before","meta-after"], }, title: "Media Player", description: "Media Player renders direct audio/video with native media playback and Muibook controls, plus provider embeds (YouTube, SoundCloud) from a single src input. The metadata slot keeps the player composable for titles, avatars, links, badges, and product actions while the component applies contextual media-player theming where possible.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2133-17634&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/media-media-player--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-media-player/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/media-player"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/media-player"], usage: { list: [ "Use for pasted media links when you want consistent in-product preview behavior.", "Rely on auto-detection for YouTube, SoundCloud, mp4/webm, and mp3/wav links.", "Set type only when you need to force a specific renderer.", "Use the default Muibook controls backed by the native audio or video element.", "Use thumbnail to opt into a richer audio presentation.", "Use waveform as an opt-in audio enhancement when the source can be fetched and decoded by the browser.", "Slotted metadata content receives contextual text, link, and action tokens where possible so composed content follows the underlying surface or image-overlay theme.", "Use overlay variants for actions over video or artwork, and normal action hierarchy such as tertiary on surface-based audio.", "Muibook controls include local seek, volume, elapsed/remaining time toggle, and an options menu for utility actions like download and opening the source.", "On compact layouts, the time action shows a single value and toggles between elapsed time and remaining time.", "Media Player control hints use disable-on-touch so tooltips remain a desktop enhancement and do not persist over touch controls.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: [ "Provide meaningful context around the media purpose using surrounding copy, `media-title`, or composed `slot='meta-before'` content.", "Keep playback user-initiated by default. If autoplay is needed, expose it as an explicit user or product setting instead of enabling it silently.", "When autoplay is enabled, prefer muted playback and avoid autoplaying content with speech, alerts, or important audio.", "Ensure slotted metadata actions have clear accessible names and do not make the entire metadata area interactive unless the whole area is intentionally actionable.", "Use real links for navigation and buttons for local actions such as opening a dialog, profile panel, or menu.", "Do not rely on visual metadata alone; titles, creator names, and action labels should remain available to assistive technology.", "Keep each media control accessible through its own label because control hints are disabled on touch-like devices.", "Treat generated waveforms as decorative support unless the same timing or structure is also available through text or controls.", ], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Media frame", "Native media element", "Optional audio visual section", "Controls row", "Progress/time control"] }, variants: { items: [{ key: "", title: "", description: "", image: "" }] }, stories: { items: [ { "key": "video", "title": "Video", "description": "Direct video file rendered with the native video element and Muibook controls.", "list": [ "Use Muibook controls when the player needs to match the product visual language.", "The native video element remains the playback engine underneath the UI.", "Use poster for iOS Safari so the preview has a stable image before playback.", "Picture-in-Picture only appears when the browser reports support; iPhone may hide it when the current video or browser context does not support it.", "Fullscreen may start playback first on iPhone because native video fullscreen must be triggered from the media element." ] }, { "key": "center-action", "title": "Center Action", "description": "Direct video file rendered with an always-visible centered play/pause action.", "list": [ "Use center-play when the preview needs an obvious primary playback action before the user explores the bottom controls.", "The centered action toggles between play and pause while the native video element remains the playback engine underneath the UI." ] }, { "key": "video-loading", "title": "Video Loading", "description": "Direct video file rendered with the centered loading affordance forced on.", "list": [ "Use loading when an externally managed media load needs visible feedback.", "This story forces the state so spinner size, placement, and contrast can be inspected without waiting for real buffering.", "Remove loading for normal playback; the player still shows the affordance automatically during native buffering events." ] }, { "key": "metadata", "title": "Metadata", "description": "Direct video file rendered with metadata and a responsive subscribe action.", "list": [ "Use this pattern when the media identity and a supporting commercial or creator action need to share the top metadata area.", "Use mui-avatar-chip in slot='meta-before' for reusable avatar and profile copy composition.", "Use slot='meta-after' for the action so the space between remains available for media playback interaction.", "Use overlay action styling when the action sits over video or artwork." ] }, { "key": "audio", "title": "Audio", "description": "Direct audio file rendered as a compact player.", "list": [ "Use this state when the player only needs playback controls.", "The native audio element remains the playback engine underneath the UI." ] }, { "key": "audio-waveform", "title": "Audio Waveform", "description": "Direct audio file rendered with an opt-in generated waveform.", "list": [ "Use waveform when audio needs a visual signature without adding artwork.", "The waveform is generated from the audio source when the browser can fetch and decode the file.", "Remote audio can fail to render a waveform when CORS blocks decoding, so keep the player usable without it." ] }, { "key": "audio-artwork", "title": "Audio Artwork", "description": "Direct audio file rendered with artwork replacing the basic metadata presentation.", "list": [ "Add artwork when the audio needs a opt-in because waveform generation depends on the browser being able to fetch and decode the audio source." ] }, { "key": "youtube-embed", "title": "YouTube Embed", "description": "Auto-detected declarations.description: Renders native or embedded audio and video media from a supplied source, with optional Muibook controls for direct media files and composable metadata for titles, avatars, links, badges, and product actions.
declarations.name: MuiMediaPlayer

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Media URL to render.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Overrides media type detection for the source URL.

attributes.name: autoplay
attributes.description: Opt-in setting that requests automatic playback when allowed by the browser. Avoid enabling by default unless the experience clearly requires it.

attributes.name: muted
attributes.description: Starts native media muted.

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: Restarts playback when media ends.

attributes.name: poster
attributes.description: Poster image URL for native video media.

attributes.name: artwork
attributes.description: Optional artwork image URL for audio artwork presentation.

attributes.name: media-title
attributes.description: Fallback title displayed in audio presentations or video metadata when slot='meta-before' is not provided.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the audio metadata or artwork presentation height using any valid CSS height value. Maps to --media-player-audio-height.

attributes.name: center-play
attributes.description: Displays an always-visible centered play/pause action over native video.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Forces the centered loading affordance for externally managed loading states, demos, or diagnostics.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description: Chooses whether Muibook controls are rendered over the native media element.

attributes.name: waveform
attributes.description: Opt-in generated waveform for audio presentations. The component fetches and decodes the source when possible; remote sources may not render a waveform if CORS blocks decoding.

slots.name: meta-before
slots.description: Optional composed top-left metadata content for audio presentations and video metadata. Use it for avatar, title, supporting copy, links, or badges. Overrides the media-title fallback layout.

slots.name: meta-after
slots.description: Optional composed top-right metadata content for actions, links, badges, or supporting controls. The space between meta-before and meta-after remains available for media playback interaction.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-main-radius
cssProperties.description: Responsive radius used by the main media player frame and visual surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-audio-height
cssProperties.description: Preferred height used for audio metadata and artwork presentations.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-seek-color
cssProperties.description: Color used for the custom seek control.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-range-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the active range track.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-range-thumb-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the range thumb.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-range-track-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the inactive range track.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-range-preview-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the seek hover preview segment.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-waveform-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the primary generated audio waveform bars.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-waveform-mirror-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for the mirrored generated audio waveform bars.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-waveform-active-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for generated audio waveform bars before the current playback position.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-waveform-active-mirror-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware color used for mirrored generated audio waveform bars before the current playback position.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-control-background
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware background used by compact audio controls.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-control-color
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware text and icon color used by compact audio controls.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-center-action-background
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware background used by centered media actions on no-image surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-center-action-overlay-background
cssProperties.description: Locked dark background used by centered media actions over video or artwork.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-center-action-overlay-background-hover
cssProperties.description: Locked dark hover background used by centered media actions over video or artwork.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-controls-peek-background
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware background used by the hidden-controls peek indicator.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-controls-peek-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by the hidden-controls peek indicator.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-audio-controls-peek-background
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware background used by the hidden-controls peek indicator on no-image audio surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-audio-controls-peek-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by the hidden-controls peek indicator on no-image audio surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-frame-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by audio metadata and artwork frames.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-video-shadow
cssProperties.description: Locked overlay shadow used by video media shells.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-artwork-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by standalone audio artwork images before full-bleed artwork mode.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-thumbnail-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by metadata avatars and fallback images.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-thumbnail-border
cssProperties.description: Locked dark border used by metadata avatars and fallback images over artwork or video.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-thumbnail-shadow
cssProperties.description: Locked dark shadow used by metadata avatars and fallback images over artwork or video.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-meta-icon-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by audio metadata fallback icons.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-range-thumb-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware shadow used by seek and volume range thumbs.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-meta-text-shadow
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware text shadow used by metadata over artwork.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-surface-overlay-start
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware top overlay color for audio metadata surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-surface-overlay-end
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware bottom overlay color for audio metadata controls.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-background
cssProperties.description: Locked dark background used by video and artwork-backed audio.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-control-color
cssProperties.description: Locked dark-surface text and icon color used by overlay controls.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-range-color
cssProperties.description: Locked dark-surface active range track color.

cssProperties.name: --media-player-dark-range-thumb-color
cssProperties.description: Locked dark-surface range thumb color.

declarations.default: { Menu: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["top","bottom"], }, title: "Menu", description: "Menu provides a reusable visual surface for dropdown and anchored overlay content.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-menu/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/menu"], guides: [""], usage: { list: ["Use inside mui-dropdown to compose the portalled menu surface.", "Use size='x-small|small|medium|large' to scale the surface radius and all direct button or link actions together.", "Render independently when reviewing menu layouts and grouped overlay content."] }, accessibility: { designerList: ["Keep menu actions concise and easy to scan."], engineerList: ["Use Dropdown when trigger, focus, dismissal, and positioning behaviour is required."] }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Surface", "Menu content"] }, variants: { items: [] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "action-menu", title: "Action Menu", list: ["Use Menu to provide the visual surface and vertical layout for a related set of actions.", "Menu accepts direct Button or Link actions and remains fully composable with system components and their slots.", "Standalone Menu uses max-content width with a 15rem minimum; Dropdown provides a min(100%, 18rem) default when the composed Menu has no explicit width.", "Set the width attribute when the composition needs a different explicit width.", "Compose Menu inside Dropdown when the surface needs trigger, portal, positioning, focus, and dismissal behaviour."] }, { key: "searchable-menu", title: "Searchable Menu", list: ["Place search and filtering controls before a scrollable action set when menus contain many options.", "Keep filtering in application state; Menu provides the visual surface and composition boundary.", "Use a hidden Body with role=status and aria-live=polite for the empty-state message. Reveal it only when every searchable action is hidden."] }, { key: "inset", title: "Inset Content", list: ["Use the inset attribute to add padding to the menu's scrollable region, allowing buttons and other nested items to retain their natural border radius instead of spanning edge-to-edge."] }, { key: "sections", title: "Sections", list: ["Use labelled sections when one Menu contains distinct groups of related files or actions.", "Place Search before the section headings when it filters content across the complete Menu.", "Use File Icon for file-type recognition and standard system icons for destinations or commands; both inherit sizing from the containing Button."] }, { key: "select-menu", title: "Select Menu", list: ["Use a direct Select when the chosen option establishes the context for the actions below it.", "This example selects a design-system theme before previewing, editing, duplicating, or exporting that theme.", "Set size on Menu only; Menu enforces the same size and inset treatment on the Select and direct actions."] }, { key: "date-menu", title: "Date Menu", list: ["Use a bottom-slotted Date Picker when the selected date applies to the actions grouped above it.", "This example supports reviewing the day, creating an event, copying the date, or exporting its schedule.", "Menu propagates its size and inset field radius to the Date Picker and its composed calendar action."] }, { key: "input-menu", title: "Input Menu", list: ["Use a bottom-slotted Input when actions above provide context for the value being entered.", "Set size on Menu only; Menu keeps the Input and actions aligned while inset preserves their individual radii."] }, { key: "time-menu", title: "Time Menu", list: ["Use a bottom-slotted Time Picker when the selected time applies to the actions grouped above it.", "The examples cover every Menu size and inherit the same size in the composed Time Picker input."] }, { key: "chip-input-menu", title: "Chip Input Menu", list: ["Use a top-slotted Chip Input to filter or assign multiple values before acting on the selection.", "The examples cover every Menu size and keep the selected chips seamless with the Menu surface."] }, { key: "language-toggles", title: "Language Toggles", list: ["Use composed rows for independent settings rather than menu commands.", "File Icon adds fast language recognition while Switch owns each boolean selection."] }, { key: "range-input-menu", title: "Range Input Menu", list: ["Use Range Input for an adjustable value within a compact settings or playback menu.", "Nested controls are sized explicitly from the same Menu size because only direct Menu children inherit size automatically."] }, { key: "sizes", title: "Sizes", list: ["Menu supports x-small, small, medium, and large.", "The selected size controls the surface radius and is enforced on direct button and link actions."] }, { key: "grouped-content", title: "Grouped Content", list: ["Use concise headings and rules to separate related groups without turning the menu into a full page layout.", "Menu accepts composed content, but interactive actions should remain easy to scan and operate.", "Use inset when grouped actions should retain their individual radii and sit inside the Menu edge."] }, { key: "selectable-actions", title: "Selectable Actions", description: "Adds application-owned single-selection behavior to a composed Menu.", list: ["Menu does not select actions automatically; manage the selected value and visual treatment in application state.", "Use the primary treatment only when an action represents the current selection, not for ordinary commands or Submenu triggers.", "Update aria-pressed with the visual variant so assistive technology receives the same selected state.", "The active appearance shown here is the base theme treatment; customize it to suit your product theme.", "Disable an action only when it must remain visible but cannot currently be used."] }, ], }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [{ name: "Dropdown", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/dropdown" }] }, rules: [], behaviour: { list: ["Menu owns presentation only; Dropdown owns overlay interaction and portal behaviour.", "Menu enforces its size and align='start' on direct Button and Link children while leaving rules and custom grouped content independently composed.", "A direct Submenu passes the same Menu action context to its direct Button trigger.", "Menu radius is capped by the matching form radius so circular action tokens cannot turn the surface into a pill.", "Direct Body content receives action padding so headings and labels align with Menu actions.", "Top and bottom slots provide compositional regions, apply seamless form-control surfaces, and add a separator only when populated.", "Use inset when a Menu includes top or bottom content; keep action-only menus edge-to-edge.", "Inset state is passed to direct Button and Link actions so each component applies its own size-specific action padding independently from Menu content padding.", "When a direct Body heading precedes the first action, that action remains square at the top because the heading already buffers it from the Menu edge."] }, writing: { list: ["Use short action labels and group related commands together."] }, }, }

declarations.description: Provides the visual surface and vertical layout for menu actions and grouped overlay content.
declarations.name: MuiMenu

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets Menu geometry and enforces the same size on direct body, action, and form-control content.

attributes.name: inset
attributes.description: Applies padding to the Menu content region and prevents direct action and form-control children from stretching to the Menu edge, allowing them to retain their natural border radius.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the Menu width using any valid CSS width value, such as 100% or min(100%, 28rem).

slots.description: Menu content. Direct body, action, Submenu, and supported form-control children inherit Menu sizing; rules and custom grouped content remain independently composed.

slots.name: top
slots.description: Top content with a bottom separator. Direct form controls merge seamlessly into the Menu surface.

slots.name: bottom
slots.description: Bottom content with a top separator. Direct form controls merge seamlessly into the Menu surface.

cssProperties.name: --menu-background
cssProperties.description: Menu surface background.

cssProperties.name: --menu-border-color
cssProperties.description: Menu surface border color.

cssProperties.name: --menu-shadow-color
cssProperties.description: Menu surface shadow color.

cssProperties.name: --menu-radius
cssProperties.description: Menu surface corner radius.

cssProperties.name: --menu-min-width
cssProperties.description: Minimum width of the menu surface.

cssProperties.name: --menu-width
cssProperties.description: Width of the Menu surface. Defaults to max-content and accepts any valid CSS width.

cssProperties.name: --menu-inset
cssProperties.description: Resolved size-based inset shared by the content region and direct Menu actions.

cssProperties.name: --chip-background-menu
cssProperties.description: Background applied to direct Chip and Chip Input compositions inside Menu.

cssProperties.name: --menu-inset-padding-block
cssProperties.description: Block padding applied to the content region when the inset attribute is used.

cssProperties.name: --menu-inset-padding-inline
cssProperties.description: Inline padding applied to the content region when the inset attribute is used.

declarations.description: Presents a persistent page-level notification with an intent icon, heading, and slotted supporting body content. Use Form Message for form guidance and Body with an info icon for lightweight inline notes.
declarations.name: MuiMessage

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the page-level intent style and default icon. Reserve positive, warning, and attention for meaningful status or severity, not routine inline emphasis.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Sets the concise message title. Do not put full body copy here; supporting content belongs in the default slot.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Overrides the default variant icon with a `mui-icon-*` tag name.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the message density and typography scale.

slots.description: Required supporting content below the heading. Use `mui-body`, `mui-list`, `mui-link`, or related content; avoid leaving the slot empty.

cssProperties.name: --message-padding
cssProperties.description: Controls the message inset spacing.

cssProperties.name: --message-gap-horizontal
cssProperties.description: Controls horizontal spacing between icon and content.

cssProperties.name: --message-gap-vertical
cssProperties.description: Controls vertical spacing between stacked content rows.

cssProperties.name: --message-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the message corner radius.

declarations.description: Renders interactive 3D models using Google's model-viewer custom element, with native model element support in Safari on visionOS 2+ as a progressive enhancement.
declarations.name: MuiModelViewer

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Path to the primary 3D model (typically GLB or GLTF).

attributes.name: ios-src
attributes.description: Path to the USDZ fallback model for Apple Quick Look on iOS and visionOS.

attributes.name: poster
attributes.description: Placeholder or loading preview image URL.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Accessible description of the 3D model for screen readers.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description: Enables orbit / zoom interactive controls.

attributes.name: camera-controls
attributes.description: Explicit control override for model-viewer's camera controls.

attributes.name: auto-rotate
attributes.description: Enables automatic rotation of the model camera.

attributes.name: ar
attributes.description: Enables AR entry trigger where supported.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Configures loading priority for the model.

slots.description: Fallback or additional content rendered when the 3D viewers are unsupported or loading.

slots.name: poster
slots.description: Custom UI elements overlaying the model before it initializes.

cssProperties.name: --mui-model-viewer-background
cssProperties.description: Theme-aware background color for the viewport.

cssProperties.name: --mui-model-viewer-radius
cssProperties.description: Corner radius of the viewer container.

cssProperties.name: --mui-model-viewer-aspect-ratio
cssProperties.description: Locked aspect-ratio constraint for the viewer container.

declarations.description: Displays a compact preview of pasted or attached prompt context and optionally opens fuller content.
declarations.name: MuiPreviewChip

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets source preview content.

members.name: badge
members.description: Gets or sets the displayed content-type badge.

members.name: label
members.description: Gets or sets the preview label.

members.name: accent
members.description: Gets or sets the preview accent CSS color.

members.name: bgImage
members.description: Gets or sets the preview background image URL.

members.name: imageTint
members.description: Gets or sets the image overlay tint.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Source text or URL rendered as preview content.

attributes.name: badge
attributes.description: Overrides the inferred content-type badge.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible and event label for the preview.

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: Accent CSS color used by non-image preview effects.

attributes.name: bg-image
attributes.description: Background image URL for image-led previews.

attributes.name: image-tint
attributes.description: CSS color used to tint a background-image preview.

attributes.name: inverted
attributes.description: Uses text styling appropriate for dark or image-backed surfaces.

attributes.name: badge-only
attributes.description: Suppresses text content so only the preview badge is displayed.

attributes.name: show-text
attributes.description: Forces preview text to display when an image background is supplied.

attributes.name: animated
attributes.description: Enables preview sheen and pulse animation.

attributes.name: animation-mode
attributes.description: Controls animation repetition.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual treatment of the preview surface.

attributes.name: clickable
attributes.description: Enables keyboard/click activation and `preview-chip-open` events.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Displays loading feedback and prevents preview activation.

attributes.name: loading-label
attributes.description: Accessible label for loading feedback.

events.name: dismiss
events.description: Cancelable event dispatched when the dismiss action is activated; includes preview details.

events.name: preview-chip-open
events.description: Dispatched when clickable preview content is activated; includes preview details.

cssProperties.name: --preview-chip-accent
cssProperties.description: Default preview effect accent when no `accent` attribute is provided.

cssProperties.name: --preview-chip-background
cssProperties.description: Base background layer for non-image previews.

cssProperties.name: --preview-chip-dismiss-secondary-background
cssProperties.description: Background of the dismiss action on standard previews.

cssProperties.name: --preview-chip-dismiss-secondary-border
cssProperties.description: Border of the dismiss action on standard previews.

declarations.description: Displays determinate progress or an indeterminate pending or syncing state.
declarations.name: MuiProgress

attributes.name: progress
attributes.description: Sets determinate progress, clamped from 0 to 100.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Displays an indeterminate state instead of determinate progress.

cssProperties.name: --progress-track-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the progress track.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the determinate bar.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-positive
cssProperties.description: Background color of positive semantic progress indicators.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-warning
cssProperties.description: Background color of warning semantic progress indicators.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-attention
cssProperties.description: Background color of attention semantic progress indicators.

cssProperties.name: --progress-syncing-bar-background
cssProperties.description: Background color of the syncing indicator.

cssProperties.name: --progress-radius
cssProperties.description: Radius applied to the track and progress bar.

cssProperties.name: --progress-syncing-width
cssProperties.description: Width of the animated syncing indicator.

cssProperties.name: --progress-pending-stripe-size
cssProperties.description: Stripe width used by the pending state.
