It belongs to the Progress family and is best for compact progress summaries in dashboards, cards, tables, and responsive layouts.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/forms-progress-ring--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-progress-ring/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/progress"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/progress"], usage: { list: [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a linear bar would take too much horizontal space.", "Use display='value' only when the progress value should appear in the center.", "Use display-value for a short custom center value, such as a completed count, remaining count, grade, or time value.", "Use color='positive', color='warning', or color='attention' for semantic score bands or stateful progress summaries.", "Use progress for percentage-based values, or value and max for count-based values.", "Use the default auto display when the ring should stay quiet and leave detail to the tooltip.", "Use x-small as an icon-sized indicator only; it does not render center text.", "Use a clear label when the generated center text is abbreviated or absent.", "Use tooltip to override the automatically generated tooltip text when the ring needs more specific context.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: ["Do not rely on ring color alone; pair important progress with text or surrounding labels."], engineerList: ["Progress Ring sets role='progressbar' and exposes aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-valuenow."], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: [ "Track: The circular background stroke.", "Indicator: The circular foreground stroke representing progress.", "Center text: Optional generated short text inside small, medium, and large rings.", "Tooltip: Optional embedded text disclosure for hover, focus, or click interaction.", ], }, variants: { items: [ { key: "x-small", title: "X-Small", description: "Use as an icon-sized indicator without center text.", image: "" }, { key: "small", title: "Small", description: "Use in dense table cells and compact summaries.", image: "" }, { key: "medium", title: "Medium", description: "Default ring size.", image: "" }, { key: "large", title: "Large", description: "Use in larger dashboard or card summaries.", image: "" }, ], }, stories: { items: [ { "key": "start-state", "title": "Start State", "description": "Shows the generated start state for count-based and progress-based data.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "progress", "title": "Progress", "description": "Use progress for percentage-based values.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "value-and-max", "title": "Value and Max", "description": "Use value and max when progress is based on completed items.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "complete", "title": "Complete", "description": "Progress at 100 renders a completion icon automatically.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "display", "title": "Display", "description": "Center value is opt-in. The value is derived from value/max or progress.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "formatting", "title": "Formatting", "description": "Generated center text is constrained so dense values do not crowd the ring.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "display-value-completed", "title": "Display Value: Completed", "description": "Use display-value when the center text should show a custom completed count.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "display-value-remaining", "title": "Display Value: Remaining", "description": "Use display-value when the center text should show a custom remaining count.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "display-value-hours", "title": "Display Value: Hours", "description": "Use display-value for short time values while progress still drives the ring.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "display-value-grade", "title": "Display Value: Grade", "description": "Use color for score bands while center text keeps the default text color.", "list": [ "Use Progress Ring for compact determinate progress where a circular display suits the layout." ] }, { "key": "tooltip-hover", "title": "Tooltip: Hover", Do not use center text at x-small.", "Keep display-value short when using grades or time values, such as B+, D-, 3d, or 6h.", "Keep tooltip text concise and descriptive, such as '2 of 4 transactions automated'.", ], }, }, }

declarations.description: Displays circular determinate progress with optional generated center text. Use for compact progress summaries in dashboards, cards, tables, and responsive summaries.
declarations.name: MuiProgressRing

attributes.name: progress
attributes.description: Sets determinate progress, clamped from 0 to 100.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Sets the completed value when using count-based progress.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Sets the total value when using count-based progress.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the progress ring.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the ring size.

attributes.name: display
attributes.description: Controls the generated center text. Auto keeps center text empty, value derives compact text from value/max or rounded progress, and completion uses a checkmark. Ignored for size='x-small'.

attributes.name: display-value
attributes.description: Overrides generated center text with a short custom value while progress, value, max, and tooltip continue to describe the underlying progress.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Applies a semantic progress color to the ring indicator. Use for score bands or stateful progress summaries.

attributes.name: tooltip
attributes.description: Overrides the embedded tooltip text. When omitted, progress ring derives tooltip text from progress, such as '50% complete', or value/max.

attributes.name: tooltip-trigger
attributes.description: Controls whether the embedded tooltip opens on hover/focus or click/keyboard activation.

attributes.name: tooltip-placement
attributes.description: Preferred embedded tooltip placement. The tooltip flips when there is not enough viewport space.

cssProperties.name: --progress-track-background
cssProperties.description: Stroke color of the progress ring track.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background
cssProperties.description: Stroke color of the default progress ring indicator.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-positive
cssProperties.description: Stroke color of positive semantic progress ring indicators.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-warning
cssProperties.description: Stroke color of warning semantic progress ring indicators.

cssProperties.name: --progress-bar-background-attention
cssProperties.description: Stroke color of attention semantic progress ring indicators.

declarations.name: muiDocs
declarations.default: { Prompt: { namedSlots: { description: "Use these names on items slotted inside this component.", list: ["context-above","context-below","preview","input","actions","actions-right"], }, title: "Prompt", description: "Prompt provides a reusable prompt surface with floating actions and Enter-to-submit behavior.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2117-17601&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/ai-llm-prompt--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/tree/main/src/components/mui-prompt"], website: ["https://muibook.com/prompt"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/prompt"], usage: { list: [ "Use for AI/chat prompt entry surfaces with action controls.", "In Muibook stories, use the Interactive Prompt story at the top of the page as the primary end-to-end reference (paste/upload/context/submit).", "This component is extracted from composition patterns to standardize prompt behavior across experiences.", "Keep prompt as a controlled input in app state: write value via attribute/property and sync from input events.", "Use Enter submit for fast send flows; keep Shift+Enter for multiline authoring.", "Press Enter to submit and Shift+Enter to add a newline.", "Set enter-submit='false' to disable Enter submit behavior.", "Use slot='actions' for utility actions (attach, source, tools).", "Prompt includes a default submit control in actions-right; override by slotting your own actions-right control when needed.", "All utility actions are intended to be slotted so product teams can wire behavior from app state.", "A default fan trigger is included out-of-the-box for action fan behavior.", "Use slot='actions-right' when you need a custom submit/toggle action instead of the default.", "Set loading to show built-in async feedback spinner beside actions-right while requests are in flight.", "Use loading-label to provide accessible status text for the spinner.", "Fan behavior derives from slotted actions by default; use fan-open when you want the fan open by default.", "fan-open normalizes fan behavior in composed trees by enabling fan mode when needed.", "Use context-mode='icon|chip' with slotted <mui-action-toggle> for app-driven context state.", "Use slot='context-above' or slot='context-below' for explicit context content, usually <mui-context-bar>.", "Only render slotted context when product state has real context to show.", "Keep feature-specific context controls inside the slotted context component; Prompt only positions the slot.", "Fan spread, speed, and amplitude are fixed to system defaults; tune through component tokens/CSS where needed.", "Built-in preview dialog handling is enabled for preview-chip-open events.", "Set preview-threshold-chars to control when pasted text is converted into preview attachments.", "Set preview-overflow-to-preview='false' to always paste text directly into the textarea.", "When internal preview dialog handling is enabled, slotted prompt previews are auto-clickable by default.", "Set preview-auto-clickable='false' to keep previews non-clickable unless explicitly configured.", "Set preview-loading to force slotted previews into loading state while async metadata resolves.", "Set preview-loading='auto' to mirror prompt loading state onto slotted previews.", "Use preview-loading-label to provide accessible loading text for preview spinners.", "Use error-message for direct prompt-level error feedback rendered below the input.", "Set debug to render built-in submit debug telemetry (status + JSON payload) below the prompt.", "Use slot='error' to render fully custom error content when product needs bespoke treatment.", "Use setError(message) and clearError() for app-driven validation and transport error handling.", "Use prompt-paste to ingest user clipboard payloads and convert them into preview-chip items.", "Use preview-chip-open to react to preview activation and update app-level analytics/state.", "For native media previews, use direct .mp4/.mp3 values so the built-in dialog opens with native media controls.", "Prefer system/semantic tokens for color-top-* values when theming prompt color surfaces.", "For React wrappers, map CustomEvent handlers to props (onSubmit, onPromptPaste, onPreviewChipOpen, onEscape).", "Mark the trigger action with fan-trigger; if omitted, the first action is used.", "Prefer this component instead of ad hoc prompt wrappers when the same interaction model is needed.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [ "Provide clear prompt intent through nearby heading/body context; placeholder alone should not carry all instruction.", "Ensure action icons are understandable and consistently positioned (utility actions left, submit/state action right).", "Keep status text low-emphasis visually, but persistent enough to communicate send state changes.", ], engineerList: [ "Support keyboard parity: Enter submits, Shift+Enter adds newline.", "If showing send status, use an aria-live region so updates are announced to assistive tech.", "Do not trap focus; users must be able to tab into and out of the prompt and actions naturally.", "Ensure slotted context controls have their own labels and keyboard behavior.", "Ensure a clear placeholder or label context for prompt intent.", "Provide aria-label values for icon-only action buttons slotted into actions.", "When authoring themes, rely on public --prompt-* tokens and attributes rather than internal prompt CSS variables.", ], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Prompt surface", "Context slot", "Input area", "Action slot"] }, variants: { items: [{ key: "", title: "", description: "", image: "" }] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "preview-data", title: "Interactive Prompt", description: "Canonical interactive setup for this page: paste and upload previews, context toggle, submit, and Prompt event telemetry.", list: [] }, { key: "context", title: "Context", description: "Prompt provides dedicated context slots above and below its surface when product state has context to show.", list: ["Use slot='context-above' or slot='context-below' for feature-owned Prompt context such as steering, persona, constraints, selected context, examples, or attachments.", "Use mui-context-bar directly or wrap it with related content in a Stack.", "Prompt applies the correct attached radius to nested Context Bars based on the chosen slot.", "Omit the slotted context entirely when there is no active context."] }, { key: "default", title: "Empty", list: ["Use this shared Prompt primitive across products."] }, { key: "glowing-ring", title: "Glowing Ring", description: "Enable ring for an animated glowing stroke. Use ring-start, ring-mid, and ring-end to define the color sweep.", list: [] }, { key: "submit-guard-api", title: "Submit Guard + API", description: "Use before-submit to block invalid sends, then call submit, clear, or focus from application controls.", list: [] }, { key: "loading", title: "Async Loading", description: "Show async spinner feedback next to submit while a request is in flight.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-loading-flow", title: "Preview Loading Flow", description: "Working async flow that toggles preview loading from an LLM or tooling lifecycle.", list: ["Set Prompt loading during the request and mirror preview loading using preview-loading='auto'.", "If enrichment continues after send completes, force preview-loading='true' and clear it when finished."] }, { key: "error-feedback", title: "Error Feedback", description: "Inject direct error text or custom slot content. Long errors can expand for review.", list: ["Use Bad Data for raw machine or system validation output.", "Use Custom Data for humanised guidance.", "Use Reset to clear both direct error-message and custom slotted error content."] }, { key: "effects-off", title: "Effects Off", description: "Disable Prompt hover and focus visuals for a flatter surface.", list: [] }, { key: "color-swap", title: "Color Layout Swap", description: "Remap the top color positions without changing the supplied color values.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-open-image-dialog", title: "Preview: Image", description: "Click an image preview to open the built-in Prompt dialog.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-media", title: "Preview: Media", description: "Checks media badges and rendering for YouTube, SoundCloud, and direct media URLs.", list: ["Use Interactive Prompt for the complete paste and upload flow."] }, { key: "preview-native-video", title: "Preview: Native Video", description: "Uses a direct MP4 URL so the dialog opens with native video controls.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-native-audio", title: "Preview: Native Audio", description: "Uses a direct MP3 URL so the dialog opens with native audio controls.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-open-dialog", title: "Preview: Code Types", description: "Formats JSON and CSS in the built-in dialog while other types render source content for comparison.", list: [] }, { key: "preview-off", title: "Preview: Off", description: "Disable preview auto-click so items remain non-interactive.", list: [] }, ] }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [ { name: "Input", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/input" }, { name: "Button", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/button" }, ], }, rules: [ { heading: "Pattern Rule", description: "Use Prompt as the shared prompt-surface primitive; keep product-specific flows in compositions.", doContent: [ { description: "Reuse this component when Enter submit + floating actions are expected.", image: "" }, ], dontContent: [ { description: "Do not rebuild the prompt shell in each composition with custom wrappers.", image: "" }, ], }, ], behaviour: { list: [ "Enter emits a submit event with current value.", "Shift+Enter inserts a newline.", "Pasting emits prompt-paste with detected payload metadata for consumers to store and render previews.", "Short text paste remains in the textarea; long text and binary paste can be converted to preview items based on threshold settings.", "Clicking a preview emits preview-chip-open with normalized preview payload (badge, value, image metadata).", "Escape emits escape and closes fan actions when open.", "Error feedback supports dismiss and optional expand/collapse for long copy.", "Clicking content inside a slotted <mui-action-toggle> emits prompt-context-change and switches to context chip mode.", "Dismissing content marked with [context-chip] emits prompt-context-dismiss and returns to icon mode.", "Content in context-above or context-below renders on the corresponding side of the prompt surface.", "Actions remain anchored at the prompt edge while text grows.", "Action behavior should be equivalent whether triggered by keyboard submit or click.", "When loading is set, prompt shows async spinner feedback near submit and blocks additional submits.", ], }, writing: { list: ["Use clear placeholder prompts that describe expected user input."], }, }, }

declarations.description: Provides a rich prompt composer with actions, previews, loading, and feedback states.
declarations.name: MuiPrompt

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the current prompt text.

members.name: errorMessage
members.description: Gets or sets the current error message.

members.name: submit
members.description: Requests submission of the current prompt value.

members.name: clear
members.description: Clears the prompt value and related visible state.

members.name: setError
members.description: Sets an error message for the prompt.

members.name: clearError
members.description: Clears the current prompt error message.

members.name: focus
members.description: Moves focus to the prompt text input.

events.name: prompt-paste
events.description: Dispatched when pasted or uploaded content is converted into prompt preview data.

events.name: prompt-context-change
events.description: Dispatched when prompt context is changed.

events.name: prompt-context-dismiss
events.description: Dispatched when prompt context is dismissed.

events.name: before-submit
events.description: Cancelable event dispatched before submission; prevent it to block submission.

events.name: submit
events.description: Dispatched after an accepted submit request with value and source details.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched when the prompt value is changed.

events.name: prompt-error-set
events.description: Dispatched when an error message is set programmatically.

events.name: prompt-error-clear
events.description: Dispatched when an existing error message is cleared.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Textarea placeholder.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial prompt value.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables prompt input.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Controls the growth range and cap while retaining the default prompt baseline height.

attributes.name: enter-submit
attributes.description: Submits when Enter is pressed; Shift+Enter inserts a new line.

attributes.name: actions-fan
attributes.description: Explicitly enables fan-mode actions; this is otherwise derived from slotted actions.

attributes.name: fan-open
attributes.description: Opens fan actions by default.

attributes.name: preview-overflow-to-preview
attributes.description: Converts sufficiently long pasted text into preview items instead of inserting it into the textarea.

attributes.name: preview-scrollbar
attributes.description: Hides scrollbar chrome while retaining horizontal preview scrolling.

attributes.name: preview-threshold-chars
attributes.description: Character threshold at which pasted text becomes a preview item.

attributes.name: preview-auto-clickable
attributes.description: Automatically enables activation behaviour on slotted previews.

attributes.name: preview-loading
attributes.description: Applies loading state to slotted previews; `auto` mirrors the prompt loading state.

attributes.name: preview-loading-label
attributes.description: Accessible loading label passed to slotted previews.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-width
attributes.description: Width used by the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-title
attributes.description: Fallback title used by the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-bordered
attributes.description: Applies `var(--border-thin)` to the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: context-mode
attributes.description: Controls which content inside `mui-action-toggle` is visible.

attributes.name: effects-off
attributes.description: Disables prompt hover and focus visual effects.

attributes.name: color-layout
attributes.description: Selects the mapping of top mesh color positions.

attributes.name: color-top-start
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh starting color.

attributes.name: color-top-mid
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh middle color.

attributes.name: color-top-end
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh ending color.

attributes.name: color-top-accent
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh accent color.

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: Error content rendered beneath the prompt.

attributes.name: debug
attributes.description: Renders built-in status and payload output for diagnostics.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Displays built-in loading feedback and prevents submission while active.

attributes.name: loading-label
attributes.description: Accessible label used by the built-in loading spinner.

attributes.name: ring
attributes.description: Replaces the default border with a lively animated glowing stroke ring.

attributes.name: --preview-chip-dialog-border
attributes.default: var(--dialog-border), or var(--border-thin) when preview-dialog-bordered is set
attributes.description: Border value passed to the internal preview dialog for custom border styling.

attributes.name: ring
attributes.description: Enable a glowing animated stroke variant for the prompt surface.

attributes.name: ring-start
attributes.description: Overrides the start color of the glowing animated stroke.

attributes.name: ring-mid
attributes.description: Overrides the middle color of the glowing animated stroke. If omitted, uses ring-start.

attributes.name: ring-end
attributes.description: Overrides the end color of the glowing animated stroke. If omitted, uses ring-start.

slots.name: context-above
slots.description: Optional context content displayed above the prompt surface, usually `mui-context-bar` or a composed stack containing it.

slots.name: context-below

slots.name: actions-right
slots.description: Trailing action override for the built-in submit or state action.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables radio interaction.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Identifier for the internal radio control.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value selected when this radio becomes checked.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Accessible name when no visible slot label is supplied.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Radio control and label size scale.

slots.description: Visible label content for the radio option.

declarations.description: Switches between slotted layout alternatives at one or two viewport or container breakpoints.
declarations.name: MuiR

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Chooses whether breakpoints respond to the viewport width or the mui-responsive host container width.

attributes.name: observe
attributes.description: Container query target used with `variant='container'`. Use `parent` for the direct parent, or a selector to observe the closest matching ancestor.

attributes.name: breakpoint
attributes.description: Single pixel breakpoint for switching between `show-below` and `show-above` content.

attributes.name: breakpoint-low
attributes.description: Lower pixel breakpoint for three-view layouts. Used with `breakpoint-high`.

attributes.name: breakpoint-high
attributes.description: Upper pixel breakpoint for three-view layouts. Used with `breakpoint-low`.

slots.description: Content displayed when no breakpoint switching attributes are provided.

slots.name: show-below
slots.description: Content displayed at or below the active lower or single breakpoint.

slots.name: show-middle
slots.description: Content displayed between `breakpoint-low` and `breakpoint-high`.

slots.name: show-above
slots.description: Content displayed above the active upper or single breakpoint.

declarations.description: Composes a compact card/slat result row for agent outputs, file edits, generated artefacts, review actions, and similar prompt response sections.
declarations.name: MuiResultBar

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Primary result text when in accordion layout.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the accordion is open (accordion layout only).

attributes.name: rule
attributes.description: Adds a top border rule (accordion layout only).

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Controls whether the result uses a flat card layout or a collapsible accordion layout.

attributes.name: col
attributes.description: Controls the internal slat grid columns when in default layout.

slots.name: accessory
slots.description: Optional leading accessory, typically an avatar, icon, or compact visual marker (default layout).

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Optional leading icon or badge (accordion layout).

slots.name: start
slots.description: Primary result content such as title, description, filename, status, or diff summary (default layout).

slots.name: after-label
slots.description: Content immediately following the label, like line diffs (accordion layout).

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Trailing actions such as undo, review, open, approve, or dismiss controls.

slots.name: content
slots.description: Accordion detail content, often a list of slats (accordion layout only).

declarations.description: Displays a horizontal or vertical divider with configurable length and weight.
declarations.name: MuiRule

attributes.name: length
attributes.description: Sets divider length using any valid CSS size value.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: Sets divider thickness. Use `thin`, `thick`, or any valid CSS size value.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: Sets divider orientation.

declarations.description: Composes mui-input, mui-button and icons into a search affordance that can vertically reveal over adjacent slotted controls.
declarations.name: MuiSearchInput

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the current search query.

events.name: toggle
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when revealed state changes with `detail.open`.

events.name: input
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched during query entry with `detail.value`.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the internal search input changes with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Identifier forwarded to the internal search input.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the search input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Hint displayed when no search value is entered.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current search query.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name forwarded to the internal input.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Search input and action size scale.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables search interaction.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reveals the search row and hides populated after-slot content. Ignored when the after slot is empty.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description: Focuses the search input when connected or when the revealed state opens.

attributes.name: cancel-label
attributes.description: Visible label for the cancel action.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Overrides internal Input block padding.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Overrides internal Input inline padding.

attributes.name: surface
attributes.description: Visual surface style. Seamless removes borders and backgrounds.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Optional compact action that opens the revealed search view. Defaults to an icon-only tertiary search button.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Adjacent controls that appear beside the compact search action before search is revealed. A direct Tab Bar inherits Search Input sizing.

declarations.description: Captures one selection from a supplied option list with label and validation styling.
declarations.name: MuiSelect

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the selected option value.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the selected option changes with `detail.value`.

events.name: input
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched during selection updates with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value of the selected option.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Select identifier used to associate the visible label.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible select label.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: JSON-encoded array of options, each containing `value` and `label`.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables selection interaction.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the supplied label while preserving it as the accessible name.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual validation state.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an optional marker beside the label.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Select size scale.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description: Controls the select rendering model. Use `custom` for the experimental native customizable select appearance with rich option content.

attributes.name: selected-content
attributes.description: Controls how custom appearance renders the closed selected value. Use `label` when rich picker options should collapse to plain option text in the trigger.

attributes.name: col
attributes.description: Custom appearance picker grid columns. The custom picker uses grid layout by default, so `col` maps to `grid-template-columns`.

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Custom appearance picker gap between options.

attributes.name: max-height
attributes.description: Optional max height for the custom appearance picker before it scrolls.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Custom appearance trigger and option vertical padding. Accepts one or two CSS padding values.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Custom appearance trigger and option horizontal padding. Accepts one or two CSS padding values.

attributes.name: surface
attributes.description: Visual surface style. Seamless removes borders and backgrounds.

cssProperties.name: --select-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Overrides the size-specific focus outline, including `none` when another visible focus treatment is provided.

declarations.name: muiDocs

declarations.description: Renders placeholder shapes and lines for loading states, with optional before and after slot composition.
declarations.name: MuiSkeleton

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: Sets the placeholder shape.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the base placeholder scale.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the rendered width.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Overrides the rendered height.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Overrides the placeholder corner radius.

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Selects the placeholder animation mode.

attributes.name: lines
attributes.description: Sets the number of generated placeholder lines.

attributes.name: gap
attributes.description: Controls spacing between generated lines.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Set to `false` to reveal the slotted content instead of placeholders.

attributes.name: line-widths
attributes.description: Provides comma-separated widths for generated lines.

attributes.name: max-width
attributes.description: Constrains the maximum rendered width.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Overrides shimmer or pulsate timing.

slots.description: Real content revealed when `loading="false"`.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Leading placeholder content, commonly used for avatar or icon blocks.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Trailing placeholder content, commonly used for actions or badges.

cssProperties.name: --skeleton-gap
cssProperties.description: Controls the internal spacing between generated lines.

cssProperties.name: --skeleton-animation-speed
cssProperties.description: Controls shimmer and pulsate timing.

cssProperties.name: --skeleton-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the default placeholder radius.

cssProperties.name: --skeleton-background
cssProperties.description: Controls the skeleton base color.

cssProperties.name: --skeleton-highlight
cssProperties.description: Controls the shimmer highlight color.

declarations.description: Presents slide content in a framed surface with optional chrome, notes and presentation controls.
declarations.name: MuiSlideFrame

events.name: fullscreen-error
events.description: Dispatched when fullscreen presentation cannot be entered or exited.

events.name: section-change
events.description: Dispatched when the active slide section changes.

events.name: notes-toggle
events.description: Dispatched when presenter notes open or close.

events.name: fullscreen-change
events.description: Dispatched when fullscreen presentation state changes.

attributes.name: ratio
attributes.description: Sets the slide aspect ratio.

attributes.name: present
attributes.description: Displays the presentation layout.

attributes.name: active-section
attributes.description: Selects the visible `mui-slide-section` item.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Sets content padding inside the slide surface.

attributes.name: notes-open
attributes.description: Displays the notes region outside presentation mode.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the frame surface treatment.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Renders a title in the default header chrome.

attributes.name: footer-text
attributes.description: Renders supporting text in the default footer chrome.

attributes.name: hide-header
attributes.description: Hides header chrome.

attributes.name: hide-footer
attributes.description: Hides footer chrome.

attributes.name: scroll
attributes.description: Allows slide surface overflow to scroll.

attributes.name: fullscreen
attributes.description: Displays the frame in its fullscreen layout state.

slots.description: Main slide content or `mui-slide-section` children.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Background or leading media positioned in the slide surface.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Custom content adjacent to the title.

slots.name: header-after
slots.description: Trailing header actions or metadata.

slots.name: header-description
slots.description: Supporting header description content.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Custom content adjacent to the footer text.

slots.name: footer-after
slots.description: Trailing footer actions or metadata.

slots.name: notes
slots.description: Presenter notes displayed when notes are open.

It is non-interactive by default, but can be interactive when composed as a trigger or compact state action.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2133-17706&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/feedback-status--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-status/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/status"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/status"], usage: { list: [ "Use Status for short object, record, workflow, or system state labels such as Active, Draft, Pending, Synced, or Review.", "Use Status for data-heavy pages where the state needs to read as a field value rather than decorative metadata.", "Use Status for state values in table cells and slat end slots, such as Paid, Pending, Urgent, Open, or Unlodged.", "Omit variant for the default low-emphasis grey status.", "Use variant for semantic feedback states and color for non-semantic categorical labels.", "Use size='x-small' next to badges or in very dense context rows, use size='small' in dense lists, tables, and slats, and use medium as the default.", "Use the before and after slots for icons only when they clarify the state.", "Add action only when the status itself should be interactive, such as performing an action or opening another control.", "Use Badge for cleaner presentational metadata on cards, messages, hero areas, controls, and marketing-style UI.", "Use Body or FormMessage for helper text; use Alert or Message for page-level notices.", "Keep status text short and avoid full-sentence guidance.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [ "Do not rely on color alone; pair important status states with clear text or an icon.", ], engineerList: [ "Status sets role='status'. Info and positive variants use polite live-region behaviour; warning and attention use assertive live-region behaviour.", "When action is present, Status uses button semantics and keyboard activation instead of live-region status semantics.", ], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: [ "Before slot: Optional leading icon or marker.", "Text: Short state label.", "After slot: Optional trailing icon or action indicator.", ], }, variants: { items: [ { key: "default", title: "Default", description: "For default or low-emphasis statuses without a variant attribute.", image: "" }, { key: "info", title: "Info", description: "For informational status values.", image: "" }, { key: "positive", title: "Positive", description: "For successful or complete statuses.", image: "" }, { key: "warning", title: "Warning", description: "For statuses that may need review.", image: "" }, { key: "attention", title: "Attention", description: "For critical or blocked statuses.", image: "" }, { key: "color", title: "Color", description: "Standalone colors map to the shared categorical color range for labels that are not semantic feedback states.", image: "", }, ], }, stories: { items: [ { key: "default", title: "Default", description: "A compact visual indicator for records, workflows, or system conditions.", list: ["Use Status when the text describes the state of an object.", "Use Badge for supporting labels and Message for persistent page-level notices."] }, { key: "variants", title: "Variants", description: "Communicates semantic status intent.", list: ["Omit variant for a neutral state.", "Use info, positive, warning, or attention according to the state meaning."] }, { key: "sizes", title: "Sizes", description: "Matches Status density to its surrounding content.", list: ["Use x-small in compact controls and dense tables.", "Use small or medium when the state needs more prominence or includes accessories."] }, { key: "standalone-colors", title: "Standalone Colors", description: "Applies categorical colour without implying feedback severity.", list: ["Use color for categories, teams, tags, or grouped workflow labels.", "Use variant for semantic intent such as positive, warning, or attention."] }, { key: "slots", title: "Before and After Slots", description: "Adds an icon or compact accessory to the Status.", list: ["Icons inherit proportional sizing from Status.", "Keep accessories concise in dense layouts."] }, { key: "action", title: "Action", description: "Makes Status an interactive compact state control.", list: ["Add action only when Status opens a menu, changes a filter, or performs a state action.", "The action treatment supplies button semantics, keyboard activation, and focus styling."] }, { key: "dropdown", title: "Dropdown Composition", description: "Uses Status as the selected value and trigger for a Dropdown.", list: ["Own the selected value in the parent application.", "Use Dropdown for menu behavior and Status for the visible state."] }, ], }, compositions: { description: "Showcases actual use cases, demonstrating how the component fits into real-world UI scenarios.", items: [], }, related: { items: [ { name: "Badge", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/badge" }, { name: "Message", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/message" }, { name: "Dropdown", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/dropdown" }, ], }, rules: [ { heading: "Status vs Badge", description: "Status should label the state of a specific thing and can be interactive when used as a trigger. Badge should support presentational UI as non-interactive lightweight metadata.", doContent: [{ description: "Use Status for operational state fields in tables, slats, dashboards, and record views.", image: "" }], dontContent: [{ description: "Do not use Status for decorative labels, paragraph guidance, or page-level notifications.", image: "" }], }, ], behaviour: { list: [ "Status supports x-small, small, and medium sizes.", "Status is non-interactive by default.", "Use action when Status is composed as a trigger, such as a dropdown action.", "Status can be composed inside other components, including dropdown actions or slat accessories.", ], }, writing: { list: [ "Use one to three words where possible.", "Prefer state labels such as Active, Draft, Pending, Review, Blocked, or Synced.", ], }, }, }

declarations.description: Communicates a compact object, record, workflow, or system state with optional before and after icons. Use for state values in tables and slats. Status is non-interactive by default, but can be interactive when composed as a trigger or compact state action.
declarations.name: MuiStatus

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets semantic feedback intent and live-region behaviour. Omit variant for the default low-emphasis grey status.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the compact scale. Use x-small next to badges or in very dense context rows, small for dense lists, tables, and slats, and medium as the default.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Applies a standalone categorical status colour. Use when the status needs a non-semantic category colour rather than feedback intent.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Makes the status interactive by applying button semantics, keyboard activation, pointer cursor, and focus styling.

slots.description: Status text.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Optional leading icon or visual marker that clarifies the state.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Optional trailing icon or action indicator.

declarations.default: { Stepper: { title: "Stepper", description: "A Stepper component visually represents a sequence of steps in a process. It helps users understand progress and navigate through multi-step workflows. This component supports both horizontal and vertical orientations.", hero: [ "https://images.ctfassets.net/i5uwscj4pkk2/423YAEfIeoDzzsK9ClbTkP/485c6c4f637080247caa150afed0ef14/Stepper_-_Home_Image.png", ], figma: [ "https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=948-4195&t=0ytskb8cxriEmdz2-1", ], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/navigation-stepper--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/tree/main/src/components/mui-stepper"], website: ["https://muibook.com/stepper"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/stepper"], usage: { list: [ "Use active-step to control the current step in a multi-step flow.", "Use size='x-small|small|medium' to match the density of the surrounding layout.", "Use interactive when users should be able to click and keyboard-navigate steps.", "Use linear with interactive to limit forward progression to the next available step while still allowing users to move backwards.", "Use explicit step states (success, pending, error, disabled) for async and validation workflows.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: [""], }, anatomy: { description: "The stepper uses two simple styles: active and inactive. Their meaning changes based on position in the sequence, representing progress through different states.", image: "https://images.ctfassets.net/i5uwscj4pkk2/6Y5iyISdhK7PX8d1cHJxWv/761efb630c924af42ebf8d8bd5fabfb2/Stepper_-_Anatomy.png", list: [ "Active / Completed / Success: Indicates the current step or a task and follow-up verification states.", list: ["Keep state labels specific enough to explain current progress."] }, { key: "vertical", title: "Vertical", description: "Presents progress in a vertical sequence.", list: ["Use for longer labels, narrow layouts, or workflows with supporting detail."] }, { key: "horizontal-secondary", title: "Horizontal: Secondary", description: "Uses the lower-emphasis treatment in a horizontal sequence.", list: ["Use when the Stepper supports rather than dominates the page hierarchy."] }, { key: "vertical-secondary", title: "Vertical: Secondary", declarations.default: { Submenu: { title: "Submenu", description: "Submenu reveals a portalled, viewport-aware nested Menu from a parent Menu action.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-submenu/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/submenu"], guides: [""], usage: { list: [ "Place Submenu directly inside Menu.", "Use a direct Button as its trigger and a direct Menu for the nested actions.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: ["Keep nested action labels concise and related to the parent trigger."], engineerList: ["Submenu synchronizes aria-haspopup and aria-expanded on its direct Button trigger."], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Button trigger", "Nested Menu"] }, variants: { items: [] }, stories: { items: [ { key: "standalone", title: "Standalone", description: "Applies the complete Submenu trigger treatment without requiring a parent Menu.", list: [ "Slot a Button containing only the trigger label, followed by the nested Menu.", "Submenu enforces tertiary treatment, start alignment, regular weight, and the fixed after-chevron.", "Set size on Submenu when it is standalone; a parent Menu automatically passes its size to Submenu.", ], }, { key: "composition", title: "Composition", description: "Reveals a related nested Menu from a direct Button trigger.", list: [ "Place Submenu directly inside a parent Menu.", "Use a direct Button containing only its label as the trigger and a direct Menu as the nested surface.", "Do not add a chevron, trigger variant, or alignment; Submenu supplies and enforces them.", "Submenu adds disclosure semantics and opens on pointer hover or keyboard focus.", ], }, { key: "sizes", title: "Sizes & Placement", description: "Inherits action context from each parent Menu size and works in any action position.", list: [ "Set size on the parent Menu; Submenu passes the matching action size, weight, variant, inset, and radius context to its trigger.", "The trigger Button only needs its label; Submenu injects the correctly sized chevron.", "The examples place Submenu first, middle, and last to verify surrounding action radii.", "Keep the nested Menu size aligned with the parent Menu unless the hierarchy needs a deliberate density change.", ], }, { key: "search", title: "Parent Search", description: "Keeps filtering at the top level while Submenu owns nested disclosure.", list: [ "Slot Search Input into the parent Menu, not the nested Menu, when it filters top-level categories.", "Keep the Submenu trigger Button label-only; the component supplies its chevron and interaction treatment.", "Hide the complete Submenu host when its trigger does not match so the nested Menu is not left as an orphaned action.", "Keep the empty-state message in application state; Submenu only owns disclosure and positioning.", ], }, { key: "viewport", title: "Viewport Placement", description: "Ports and repositions the nested Menu when inline space is constrained.", list: [ "Submenu prefers the inline end and flips to the inline start when the viewport is tight.", "Author only the trigger label inside Button; the fixed chevron remains owned by Submenu while it repositions.", "If neither side fully fits, the nested Menu overlaps the parent Menu instead of clipping outside the viewport.", "The portalled Menu remains above parent overflow and adjacent focused controls while it is open.", ], }, ], }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [{ name: "Menu", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/menu" }, { name: "Dropdown", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/dropdown" }] }, rules: [], behaviour: { list: [ "The nested Menu opens on pointer hover or when focus moves into Submenu.", "While open, the nested Menu is portalled to a body-level overlay and restored to its authored position when closed.", "An invisible bridge covers the visual gap, and a short close delay supports diagonal pointer movement into the nested Menu.", "The nested Menu prefers the inline end, flips to the inline start when space is constrained, and overlaps the parent Menu as a final fallback instead of clipping outside the viewport.", "Vertical placement shifts as needed to keep the nested Menu visible.", "Position is recalculated while open when the viewport, a scroll container, or the nested Menu size changes.", "The portal keeps focused controls, parent stacking contexts, and overflow containers beneath the nested Menu without moving external focus.", "Pointer activation does not retain focus on the trigger, and selecting a nested action closes the Submenu.", "The parent Menu passes its action size, weight, variant, inset, and radius context to the trigger.", ], }, writing: { list: ["Name the trigger for the category of actions contained in the nested Menu."] }, }, }

declarations.description: Reveals a portalled, viewport-aware nested Menu from a Button trigger.
declarations.name: MuiSubmenu

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the trigger and nested Menu size. A parent Menu automatically enforces its own size.

slots.description: A direct Button trigger followed by the direct Menu containing the nested actions. Submenu supplies the trigger treatment and chevron.

declarations.description: Toggles a boolean state with a labelled switch control.
declarations.name: MuiSwitch

members.name: checked
members.description: Gets or sets the checked state.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when user interaction changes state with `detail.checked`.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the switch control.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables switch interaction.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Controls the selected state of the switch.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Switch control size.

slots.name: on-icon
slots.description: Icon shown for the checked state.

slots.name: off-icon
slots.description: Icon shown for the unchecked state.

cssProperties.name: --switch-track-background
cssProperties.description: Track background used when the switch is unchecked.

cssProperties.name: --switch-track-background-checked
cssProperties.description: Track background used when the switch is checked.

cssProperties.name: --switch-thumb-bg
cssProperties.description: Thumb background used when the switch is unchecked.

cssProperties.name: --switch-icon
cssProperties.description: Slotted icon fill used when the switch is unchecked.

cssProperties.name: --switch-width-computed
cssProperties.description: Resolved switch track width; may be overridden for a custom size treatment.

cssProperties.name: --switch-height-computed
cssProperties.description: Resolved switch track height; may be overridden for a custom size treatment.

cssProperties.name: --switch-thumb-size-computed
cssProperties.description: Resolved switch thumb dimension; may be overridden for a custom size treatment.

cssProperties.name: --switch-offset-computed
cssProperties.description: Resolved inset between switch track and thumb.

cssProperties.name: --switch-thumb-bg-checked
cssProperties.description: Thumb background used when the switch is checked.

cssProperties.name: --switch-icon-checked
cssProperties.description: Slotted icon fill used when the switch is checked.

declarations.description: Captures multi-line text with label, validation state, visible rows and optional character counting.
declarations.name: MuiTextarea

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the current textarea value.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the native textarea change event occurs with `detail.value`.

events.name: input
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched during value entry with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current textarea value.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Hint displayed when no value is entered.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Textarea identifier used to associate the visible label.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible textarea label.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables text entry.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the supplied label while preserving it as the accessible name.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual validation state.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Initial visible row count.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an optional marker beside the label.

attributes.name: max-length
attributes.description: Maximum character length. Providing it displays a live count.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Textarea size scale.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Overrides native textarea block padding with a CSS length or token.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Overrides native textarea inline padding with a CSS length or token.

attributes.name: surface
attributes.description: Visual surface style. Seamless removes borders and backgrounds.

cssProperties.name: --textarea-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Overrides the size-specific focus outline, including `none` when another visible focus treatment is provided.

declarations.description: A scrolling columnar interface for selecting a specific time of day.
declarations.name: MuiTime

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the selected time value.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the selected time changes with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The selected time. Format depends on `format` attribute (e.g. '14:30' or '02:30 PM').

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: Controls the display and value format of the time.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: The interval size for the minutes column (e.g., '15' for 00, 15, 30, 45).

attributes.name: start
attributes.description: The start time for the 'slots' variant (e.g. '09:00').

attributes.name: end
attributes.description: The end time for the 'slots' variant (e.g. '17:00').

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The visual layout of the time picker. 'wheels' shows columnar scrolling lists, 'slots' shows a flat list of time chips.

attributes.name: header
attributes.description: An optional header string displayed above the time slots.

cssProperties.name: --time-picker-height
cssProperties.description: Controls the overall height of the scrolling columns.

cssProperties.name: --time-item-height
cssProperties.description: Controls the height of individual time slots in the columns.

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the selected time value.

events.name: change
events.description: Composed, bubbling event dispatched when the selected time value changes with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The selected time value.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The layout of the time picker. 'time' shows scrolling wheels, 'timeslot' shows selectable chips.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The label for the input field.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the label while remaining accessible.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an (optional) tag next to the label.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The physical size of the input.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The visual variant of the input field.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Overrides internal Input block padding.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Overrides internal Input inline padding.

attributes.name: surface
attributes.description: Visual surface style. Seamless removes borders and backgrounds.

Thumbnail displays a video poster image with a consistent frame, optional metadata, and opt-in video affordances.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2117-18632&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/media-video-thumbnail--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-video-thumbnail/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/video-thumbnail"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/video-thumbnail"], usage: { list: [ "Use Video Thumbnail for video-card previews and media browsing compositions.", "Use `src` and `alt` for the thumbnail image, or slot a [""], engineerList: ["Provide meaningful `alt` text when the thumbnail image communicates unique video content."], }, stories: { items: [ { "key": "default", "title": "Default", "description": "A src-dark, or src-{brand}-{theme} when artwork needs to follow the active theme or brand.", "The border is none by default so themes can opt into a framed treatment with tokens." ] }, { "key": "play-affordance", "title": "Play Affordance", "description": "Use play and overlay when the thumbnail should expose a stronger video affordance.", "list": [ "Use play to reveal the centered video icon on hover.", "Use overlay to opt into the shade layer; it is transparent until tokens or hover state style it." ] }, { "key": "linked-card", "title": "Linked Card", "description": "Compose the thumbnail inside a link or button surface and slot metadata into the thumbnail.", "list": [ "Keep interaction semantics on the outer control.", "When mui-link contains mui-video-thumbnail it receives has-video internally, which removes the default action chrome.", "Use the meta slot when the thumbnail and text should move as one composed media card." ] }, { "key": "button-card", "title": "Button "Custom Ratio", "description": "Use aspect-ratio when the poster should match a different media format.", "list": [ "Use the aspect-ratio attribute for one-off layout changes.", "Use "Media Player", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/media-player", }, ], }, }, }

declarations.description: Displays a video thumbnail image with optional play affordance, hover treatment, and tokenized frame styling.
declarations.name: MuiVideoThumbnail

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Image URL used for the thumbnail.

attributes.name: src-light
attributes.description: Image URL used when `data-theme='light'`.

attributes.name: src-dark
attributes.description: Image URL used when `data-theme='dark'`.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alternative text passed to the thumbnail image.

attributes.name: aspect-ratio
attributes.description: Sets the thumbnail frame aspect ratio.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Image loading strategy.

attributes.name: decoding
attributes.description: Image decoding hint.

attributes.name: play
attributes.description: Displays the centered play affordance on hover.

attributes.name: overlay
attributes.description: Enables the hover shade overlay.

attributes.name: src-{brand}-{theme}
attributes.description: Brand and theme specific image URL. For example `src-paperclip-light` or `src-sensei-dark`. Falls back to `src-{theme}`, `src-{brand}`, then `src`.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Optional slotted image. Used when `src` is not provided.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Optional metadata content shown below the thumbnail frame.

cssProperties.name: --video-thumbnail-aspect-ratio
cssProperties.description: Default thumbnail aspect ratio.

cssProperties.name: --video-thumbnail-radius
cssProperties.description: Thumbnail frame border radius.

cssProperties.name: --video-thumbnail-background
cssProperties.description: Thumbnail frame background.

[ "Use inside the header slot of Chat Message when an agent response needs a collapsible work summary.", "Set label to the short summary, such as elapsed work time.", "Use the default slot for compact Ran checks.", "Nested work rows are treated as secondary detail inside the parent work disclosure.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: [ "Worker uses Accordion Core internally, state.", "Use variant='error' with status for a non-interactive failure state using the attention treatment.", "Status rows have no disclosure toggle or accordion interaction."] }, { key: "nested",
