declarations.description: Displays a compact expandable work summary for agent responses, such as elapsed work time, steps reviewed, checks run, or supporting execution detail.
declarations.name: MuiWorkLog

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Summary text shown in the collapsed row, for example `Worked for 4m 10s`.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Opens the work detail disclosure by default.

attributes.name: rule
attributes.description: Adds a trailing rule when Worker is used outside the Chat Message header slot. Top-level header rows draw their divider on the summary row.

attributes.name: nested
attributes.description: Applies compact nested work-row treatment. This is also applied automatically when Worker is placed inside another Worker.

attributes.name: pending
attributes.description: Marks the row as in progress. When combined with `status`, the label uses the Thinking shimmer treatment.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Renders a non-interactive status row without accordion behavior or toggle icon, useful for Thinking states.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Applies the attention text treatment to an error status.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Optional leading status or task icon. Typically used for an activity indicator.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Optional composable area before the main text label.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Optional composable area after the main text label. Can be used for extra actions, badges, etc.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Worker execution detail rows. Renders as accordion content.

declarations.description: Expands a block-level detail region below a generated heading control.
declarations.name: MuiAccordionBlock

events.name: accordion-opened
events.description: Dispatched when the accordion is opened.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Visible label for the accordion summary control.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets summary and detail spacing.

attributes.name: level
attributes.description: Semantic heading level for the generated summary label.

attributes.name: detail-space
attributes.description: Removes built-in padding from the expanded detail region.

slots.name: detail
slots.description: Content displayed when the accordion is expanded.

declarations.description: Provides disclosure behaviour for custom slotted summary and detail content.
declarations.name: MuiAccordionCore

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Displays the slotted detail content.

slots.name: summary
slots.description: Custom interactive summary content.

slots.name: detail
slots.description: Content displayed when the accordion is expanded.

declarations.description: Groups accordion blocks and can restrict expanded state to one block at a time.
declarations.name: MuiAccordionGroup

attributes.name: exclusive
attributes.description: Closes other accordion blocks when a block in the group opens.

slots.description: Related `mui-accordion-block` children.

declarations.description: Expands inline disclosure content below a compact generated heading control.
declarations.name: MuiAccordionInline

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Visible label for the accordion summary control.

attributes.name: level
attributes.description: Semantic heading level for the generated summary label.

slots.name: detail
slots.description: Content displayed when the accordion is expanded.

declarations.description: Displays the main content area of a card and adapts spacing for known layout components.
declarations.name: MuiCardBody

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls internal Card Body padding, not Card width. Medium is the default, small is compact, large is spacious, and none is edge-to-edge.

slots.description: Main card content, including layouts such as tables, slats, and accordions.

declarations.description: Frames related content in a bordered surface and coordinates spacing with its slotted card sections. Card has no size scale; its width comes from the parent layout or an explicit constrained style.
declarations.name: MuiCard

attributes.name: borderless
attributes.description: Removes the card border.

slots.description: Related `mui-card-header`, `mui-card-body`, and `mui-card-footer` sections.

cssProperties.name: --card-radius
cssProperties.description: Corner radius applied to the card surface.

declarations.description: Displays supporting actions or code content after the main card body.
declarations.name: MuiCardFooter

slots.description: Footer actions, links, button groups, or code blocks.

declarations.description: Displays heading or summary content at the top of a card.
declarations.name: MuiCardHeader

slots.description: Header content such as headings, text, or actions.

declarations.description: Coordinates carousel controls and item panels, with optional automatic rotation.
declarations.name: MuiCarouselController

attributes.name: auto-rotate
attributes.description: Cycles through carousel items automatically while visible and not interacted with.

attributes.name: rotate-interval
attributes.description: Delay between automatic carousel transitions in milliseconds.

attributes.name: borderless
attributes.description: Removes the Carousel frame border while retaining its surface and radius.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Use none to remove the Carousel surface radius while retaining overflow clipping.

attributes.name: swipe
attributes.description: Use none to disable the default touch, pen, and mouse swipe navigation.

slots.name: controls
slots.description: A `mui-tab-bar` that selects carousel items.

slots.name: item
slots.description: Related `mui-carousel-panel` item content.

cssProperties.name: --carousel-background
cssProperties.description: Carousel surface background.

cssProperties.name: --carousel-radius
cssProperties.description: Carousel surface radius.

cssProperties.name: --carousel-tab-position
cssProperties.description: Offset applied to slotted controls.

declarations.description: Displays content associated with a selected carousel control.
declarations.name: MuiCarouselPanel

attributes.name: item
attributes.description: Identifier matched by the related carousel tab item.

slots.description: Carousel panel content.

declarations.description: Renders one text item within a `mui-list`.
declarations.name: MuiListItem

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Accepted compatibility attribute; the current list item presentation uses the default text color.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the list item text size.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: Sets the list item text weight.

slots.description: List item text or inline content.

declarations.description: Groups ordered or unordered list item content.
declarations.name: MuiList

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Sets unordered or ordered marker styling for the list.

slots.description: Related `mui-list-item` children.

declarations.description: Groups related slats and rules with context-aware alignment spacing.
declarations.name: MuiSlatGroup

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Applies spacing and offsets appropriate to card or accordion contexts.

slots.description: Related `mui-slat` elements and optional `mui-rule` dividers.

declarations.description: Arranges leading and trailing row content with optional action and accessory treatments.
declarations.name: MuiSlat

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the slat layout and interactive presentation. Explicitly set variant='row' for standard row slats unless creating a header (variant='header'), interactive action slat (variant='action'), or custom layout; Slat items inside SlatGroup or CardBody require an explicit variant for automatic layout and card alignment.

attributes.name: col
attributes.description: Sets grid columns using any valid `grid-template-columns` value. Action slats default to `minmax(0, 1fr) auto` so trailing content stays aligned to the end.

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Sets spacing between slat columns using any valid CSS gap value or token, including action slats.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Removes the button radius for grouped action slats.

slots.name: accessory
slots.description: Optional leading avatar, icon or compact supporting element.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Primary row content.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Trailing value, status or action content.

cssProperties.name: --slat-background
cssProperties.description: Background color for row and action slats.

cssProperties.name: --slat-background-hover
cssProperties.description: Hover background color for action slats.

cssProperties.name: --slat-radius
cssProperties.description: Radius applied to row and action slats.

declarations.description: Defines an individual step inside `mui-stepper` with a title, state, and optional secondary content.
declarations.name: MuiStep

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Overrides the visual state for the individual step.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Sets the step label text.

attributes.name: hide-icon
attributes.description: Hides the step state icon and dot marker.

slots.name: secondary
slots.description: Secondary supporting content rendered with the step title.

cssProperties.name: --stepper-color
cssProperties.description: Controls the default step text and connector color.

cssProperties.name: --stepper-success-color
cssProperties.description: Controls the success state color.

cssProperties.name: --stepper-error-color
cssProperties.description: Controls the error state color.

cssProperties.name: --stepper-title-only
cssProperties.description: Controls the vertical title offset when a step has no secondary slot content.

declarations.description: Arranges slotted content vertically with token-based spacing and alignment controls.
declarations.name: MuiVStack

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Gap between children. Accepts any valid CSS gap value or design token.

attributes.name: alignx
attributes.description: Horizontal alignment of children, mapped to grid `justify-items`.

attributes.name: aligny
attributes.description: Vertical alignment of children, mapped to grid `align-items`.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Padding applied inside the stack. Accepts any valid CSS padding value or design token.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the host height. Accepts any valid CSS height value, including tokens.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the host width. Accepts any valid CSS width value, including tokens.

attributes.name: viewport
attributes.description: Sets stack height to `100dvh`. Intended for a top-level stack that owns the viewport-height region.

attributes.name: fill
attributes.description: Sets width and height to `100%` when the parent supplies a clearly bounded layout region.

slots.description: Content arranged vertically inside the stack.

cssProperties.name: --stack-height
cssProperties.description: Resolved stack host height. Prefer the `height`, `viewport`, or `fill` attributes for common layouts.

cssProperties.name: --stack-width
cssProperties.description: Resolved stack host width. Prefer the `width` or `fill` attributes for common layouts.

declarations.description: Arranges slotted content horizontally with token-based spacing and alignment controls.
declarations.name: MuiHStack

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Gap between children. Accepts any valid CSS gap value or design token.

attributes.name: aligny
attributes.description: Vertical alignment of children, mapped to flex `align-items`.

attributes.name: alignx
attributes.description: Horizontal alignment of children, mapped to flex `justify-content`.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Padding applied inside the stack. Accepts any valid CSS padding value or design token.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the host height. Accepts any valid CSS height value, including tokens.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the host width. Accepts any valid CSS width value, including tokens.

attributes.name: viewport
attributes.description: Sets stack height to `100dvh`. Intended for a top-level stack that owns the viewport-height region.

attributes.name: fill
attributes.description: Sets width and height to `100%` when the parent supplies a clearly bounded layout region.

attributes.name: wrap
attributes.description: Controls horizontal wrapping. Use `wrap="wrap"` for explicit wrapping, or the bare `wrap` attribute as shorthand.

slots.description: Content arranged horizontally inside the stack.

cssProperties.name: --stack-height
cssProperties.description: Resolved stack host height. Prefer the `height`, `viewport`, or `fill` attributes for common layouts.

cssProperties.name: --stack-width
cssProperties.description: Resolved stack host width. Prefer the `width` or `fill` attributes for common layouts.

declarations.description: Displays progress across a multi-step flow with optional interactive navigation.
declarations.name: MuiStepper

events.name: step-change
events.description: Emitted when the active step changes during interactive use.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: Sets the step flow direction.

attributes.name: active-step
attributes.description: Sets the current active step position.

attributes.name: linear
attributes.description: Restricts interactive navigation to the current and next available step.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Enables click and keyboard navigation between steps.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the stepper visual scale.

slots.description: Accepts one or more `mui-step` children.

declarations.description: Displays content inside a table row with optional checkbox or action-column alignment.
declarations.name: MuiCell

attributes.name: align-y
attributes.description: Sets vertical alignment using any valid CSS `align-self` value.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Aligns a final-column action control using the parent row action size.

attributes.name: checkbox
attributes.description: Applies compact alignment for a checkbox column.

slots.description: Cell text or component content.

declarations.description: Arranges table cells in a configurable column grid.
declarations.name: MuiRow

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Sets column sizing using any valid `grid-template-columns` value.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets row cell typography and action-column sizing.

attributes.name: row-id
attributes.description: Stable row identifier used by parent table features such as `highlight-row`.

slots.description: Related `mui-cell` children.

cssProperties.name: --row-action-size
cssProperties.description: Resolved square action-cell size for the current row.

cssProperties.name: --row-min-height
cssProperties.description: Minimum row height.

declarations.description: Coordinates a tab bar and related tab panels by matching selected tab IDs to panel item values.
declarations.name: MuiTabController

slots.description: A `mui-tab-bar` followed by related `mui-tab-panel` elements.

declarations.description: Interactive tab label controlled by a parent `mui-tab-bar`.
declarations.name: MuiTabItem

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Marks the selected tab item.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Tab item size, normally forwarded by `mui-tab-bar`.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Tab item presentation, normally forwarded by `mui-tab-bar`.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Identifier matched by a related `mui-tab-panel[item]`.

slots.description: Visible tab label.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Optional leading icon, badge or custom affordance.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Optional trailing icon, badge or custom affordance.

declarations.description: Groups row collections into an accessible table layout.
declarations.name: MuiTable

attributes.name: highlight
attributes.description: Opts into row-driven highlight behavior. `hover` follows the pointer, `select` updates the highlight when a body row is clicked. Use one mode at a time.

attributes.name: highlight-row
attributes.description: Opt-in animated row highlight target matching a child row's `row-id`.

attributes.name: highlight-row-index
attributes.description: Opt-in animated row highlight target by zero-based body row index for static tables.

slots.description: Related `mui-row-group` children.

events.name: row-highlight-change
events.description: Dispatched when `highlight="select"` changes the highlighted row with `detail.row`, `detail.rowId`, `detail.rowIndex`, and `detail.source`.

cssProperties.name: --table-row-highlight-background
cssProperties.description: Background for the animated row highlight layer.

cssProperties.name: --table-row-highlight-radius
cssProperties.description: Border radius for the animated row highlight layer.

cssProperties.name: --table-row-highlight-shadow
cssProperties.description: Optional shadow for the animated row highlight layer.

cssProperties.name: --table-row-highlight-speed
cssProperties.description: Transition speed for row highlight movement and resizing.

cssProperties.name: --table-row-highlight-easing
cssProperties.description: Transition easing for row highlight movement and resizing.

declarations.description: Groups related table rows and optionally presents them as a heading region.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Applies header row styling to the contained rows.

slots.description: Related `mui-row` children.

declarations.description: Groups related tab items and renders an active selection highlight.
declarations.name: MuiTabBar

events.name: tab-change
events.description: Dispatched when the active tab changes.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size applied to child tab items.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual treatment for the tab bar and its children.

attributes.name: stroke
attributes.description: Controls whether the default tab bar border is rendered. When border is used, child tab item heights are reduced so the total control height stays aligned to action sizing.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Overrides the tab bar radius. Token values map to `--radius-*`; raw CSS radius values are also accepted.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Applies the contextual treatment used when Tab Bar sits inside a framed surface such as Card, Drawer, Dialog, or Carousel.

attributes.name: active-inset
attributes.description: Uses an inset active shadow recipe for the selected tab surface instead of the default active shadow.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: ARIA orientation and keyboard navigation axis.

attributes.name: speed
attributes.description: Active indicator transition duration in milliseconds.

attributes.name: full-width
attributes.description: Expands the tab bar across the available width.

attributes.name: controlsPosition
attributes.description: Positions tab controls when the tab bar is slotted into a `mui-carousel-controller`.

slots.description: Tab items controlled by the tab bar.

cssProperties.name: --tab-border-color-surface
cssProperties.description: Tab Bar border color used when `usage='surface'` is applied.

cssProperties.name: --tab-border-color-active-inset
cssProperties.description: Tab Bar border color used when `usage='surface'` and `active-inset` are applied together.

cssProperties.name: --tab-background-surface
cssProperties.description: Tab Bar background used when `usage='surface'` is applied.

cssProperties.name: --tab-background-active-surface
cssProperties.description: Active tab background used when `usage='surface'` is applied.

cssProperties.name: --tab-shadow-active-color
cssProperties.description: Default color used to construct the active highlight shadow.

cssProperties.name: --tab-shadow-active
cssProperties.description: Full box-shadow value for the active tab highlight, allowing geometry and color overrides.

cssProperties.name: --tab-active-shadow
cssProperties.description: Resolved active tab shadow used by the highlight layer.

cssProperties.name: --tab-active-inset-width
cssProperties.description: Inset width used to create the inner active surface when `active-inset` is present.

members.name: item
